title: Agile Engineer Data Management
description:
**Agile Engineer Data Management**

As an Agile Engineer, you will work in the Corporate Solution Data Management team, with a strong focus on Enterprise Data Management solutions. You play a critical role in developing and designing data solutions in this domain.
  

  

You will help us move to the next level of Data Management by translating business requirements to high performing technical solutions. While doing this you take into account Metadata, Governance and Authorization and make sure they are part of your solution.
  

  

We are looking for an enthusiastic data professional who has a strong technical focus but also knows the way to communicate with Product Owners and challenge them on their requirements. **.**

  



**Day to day:**

You can expect a data team of approximately 60 enthusiastic people (Data Management, Data Governance, Global Reporting and IT Delivery) to work on multiple projects to realize the Data Management strategy for DLL. The Agile Engineer is part of the IT delivery team.


* Design data flows that transfer data from the countries to the different Enterprise Data Management solutions
* Translate business requirements to technical logic that translates and stores data in different layers of our solutions
* Support your team in delivering high quality solutions by reviewing their code and solutions
* Help business owners by explaining and showing them how data is moved and stored in our solutions
* Discuss with architects how new data solutions can fit in our IT landscape
* Advising on different technical solutions within data management
* Resolve challenging technical issues around performance, deployments, authorization and availability.
* Drive innovation in data management by using AI.

**All members enjoy**

* Two working days per year volunteering for a local charity.
* Health and Wellness program including healthy food, free health checks, fun health \& vitality activities.
* Flexible hours with possibility to work from home
* Career development opportunities: online learning, member development programs.
  
* 

“We lead the way in meeting the need for flexibility and transparency which our customers increasingly expect”


**Essentials:**

* Bachelor or University Level Education.
* 1\-3 years of experience in Data Management solutions
* Experience with Microsoft Azure\-stack
* Hands\-on experience in building dataflows with Azure Data Factory
* Experience in SQL at medium level (or higher)
* Excellent communicator in speech and writing.
* Focus on delivery and motivation to achieve results
* Problem solving skills
* Experience in working in Agile/scrum environments
* Experience is a pre, but not decisive.

**Extras:**

* Tech savvy – interested in new technical solutions
* Experience in Databricks or Python or PowerBI
* Experience with Data Lake structures
* Experience with DataWareHouses
* Azure Certifications
* Experience in large corporate finance institutions

**Choose wellbeing**

DLL’s wellbeing ambition is to educate, equip and empower members to build connections, manage their mental, emotional, physical and financial wellness and maintain balance between work and the other priorities that make up their lives.


Our four wellbeing categories are as follows:


* Connection – Build meaningful connections with other DLL members
* Health – Manage mental, emotional and physical health
* Finance – Provide learning opportunities to help members achieve personal financial health
* Lifestyle – Maintain balance between work and life priorities

These are the things that matter to our members and the wellbeing of our members matters to DLL


**Good to know:**

* Cover Letter is required: what is your motivation to join our team, why is this role a good fit for you?
* The skillset described above provides a good indication for what the team is looking for to fulfil the function. If you don't have all the skills mentioned but still think you would be a good fit, let us know what you can bring to the team in your cover letter.
* This (hybrid) role is based in Eindhoven, office presence is required for a minimum of 2 days a week as we value connecting with our team, department and stakeholders in person.
* Deadline for application: April 30th (Due to high volume of applications this requisition may close prior to posted close date)
* The selection process may involve an assessment
* Applications via email will not be reviewed. Please apply online via our career website
* \#LI\-OMNIA
* DLL’s referral program applies
* For more information, please contact our Talent Acquisition Partner Omnia Hassan via omnia.hassan@dllgroup.com

DLL appreciates the time you spend applying to our openings. We advise only those who qualify for an interview will be contacted. Hiring subject to successful completion of a background check.


DLL is an equal opportunity employer. We are committed to inclusive, barrier\-free recruitment and selection processes and work environments. If contacted for an employment opportunity, please advise Human Resources if you require accommodation in accordance with our values and all applicable legislation.


  
**DLL, a great place to build your career**

DLL is a global asset finance company that partners with manufacturers, dealers, distributors, and end users to facilitate access to equipment and technology. Headquartered in Eindhoven, the Netherlands, we operate in over 25 countries, offering financial solutions across various industries. We are also a 100% subsidiary of our parent company Rabobank, one of the world’s largest financial companies. Join our community of over 6\.000 members from 75 nationalities! At DLL, our unique culture — shaped by our values (We put our customers first \-Together we achieve more\-You can count on me \- I challenge myself and others to grow) and behaviors that define us — is at the heart of everything we do.


We offer exciting job opportunities where you feel welcomed, respected and empowered to be your authentic self and share your best ideas. At DLL, we believe in the strength of our diverse perspectives and experiences, which make our global community thrive.


You’ll receive competitive pay, generous benefits, health and wellbeing support, and manage your work\-life balance through our hybrid working flexibility.


Our global operations offer you a variety of development opportunities and we encourage you to take on new challenges across our departments, businesses and regions.


Our company strategy emphasizes our commitment to sustainable business and making social impact is part of that as well. Together, we’ll “Partner for a better world” to make a positive impact. Joining DLL, means joining a company that consistently scores higher than the industry average in Employee Engagement surveys. This is also being acknowledged through many Great Place to Work certificates. People who work at DLL, like DLL.


Join us in Partnering for a better world!

title: App Analytics Analyst – eMobility (SaaS)
description:
Stop waiting for a domain to call your own, at Deftpower, it's yours from week one. Join Deftpowers App Team!



Full\-time



**About Deftpower**
-------------------



At Deftpower, we’re shaping the future of electric charging every single day. Our SaaS\-platform helps businesses across Europe make charging simpler, smarter and more sustainable. With AI and intelligent software, we make sure charging works seamlessly with the energy grid, creating a greener and more stable system for everyone.



We’re growing fast, thanks to a recent major investment, and there’s never a dull moment! We’re expanding, improving our technology. We hope our team of 85 grows to 125 by the end of this year!


### **About the team**



You join our App team, based in Arnhem. The team builds and improves the Deftpower app used by drivers across Europe every day. We work closely with Product, Engineering and our clients to create an experience that simply works, from the moment a driver opens the app to the moment they unplug.



Right now, we know a lot is happening in the app, but we can't always see exactly what. That changes with you. There's a foundation in place, but the real work is still ahead. You'll have the space, the support and the ownership to build something from the ground up that the whole organisation will rely on.  


**About the role**
------------------



You'll be the person the App team, our clients and our stakeholders have been waiting for! Questions about how drivers move through the app, where they drop off, what actually drives engagement, they come in constantly. Right now, nobody owns the answers. That changes with you.



There's a foundation in place, but most of the build is still ahead. You'll set up the analytics infrastructure from scratch: tagging plans, event tracking, behaviour dashboards, A/B tests. You'll translate raw behaviour data into insights that directly shape product decisions. You'll do that both internally and with our clients, who are actively asking for this kind of expertise.



This puts you at the centre of product, engineering and client relationships all at once. Your team lead has a data background themselves, so you'll have a real sparring partner from day one.


* Build and own app analytics infrastructure, including tagging plans and event tracking (e.g. GA4\);
* Develop behaviour dashboards covering user flows, funnels and session performance;
* Design and execute A/B tests together with Product Owners and Engineers;
* Analyse drop\-off patterns and translate friction into concrete product recommendations;
* Advise clients on what their user data means and how to act on it.
  


**For you**
-----------



You get a domain that's yours. No one looking over your shoulder telling you how to measure things, you build the standard. The questions you answer will directly influence what gets built and what gets dropped. Internally, you'll be the go\-to. Externally, clients are already asking for exactly what you'll deliver.



And you'll do it inside a company that moves fast, skips the politics and gives you room to grow. Your Team Lead and the wider data team are there to support you.



To strengthen our team spirit, we host quarterly Deftpower Days (D\-Day), where colleagues from Arnhem, Berlin and Sweden come together.


* Salary range between €55\.000 and €75\.000 a year, depending on experience.
* Holiday allowance and vacation days in line with Dutch regulations.
* Pension and long term benefits arranged according to Dutch standards.
* €2\.000 training budget per year.
* Choose your own laptop up to €1\.750\.
* Hybrid working, short decision lines and a high level of trust.
  


**About you**
-------------



You know how to turn data into a story that actually lands, with engineers, product managers and clients alike. Numbers are your starting point, not your endpoint. You bring people to insights they wouldn't have reached on their own, and you make it look effortless. That's why you are the hero we have been waiting for!


* You have hands\-on experience with app analytics: event tracking, tools like GA4, Mixpanel or Amplitude;
* You know how to set up and validate tracking together with engineering teams;
* You understand A/B testing and can advise on design, validity and interpretation;
* You're comfortable in a client\-facing role and can explain complex data in plain language;
* You recognise yourself in our values: Drive, Earnest, Forward thinking and Transparency.


**Our values**
--------------



**Drive**



You love turning ideas into action. You take ownership, push projects forward and get energy from creating solutions that actually work in the real world.

  


**Earnest**



You do the right thing, especially when no one’s watching. You’re respectful, honest and reliable, colleagues know they can count on you.

  


**Forward thinking**



You’re curious and not afraid to try new things. You experiment, learn fast and spot opportunities before others see them coming. Calculated risks? You’re in.

  


**Transparency**



You believe sharing is power. You communicate openly, give constructive feedback and make your work visible so the whole team can grow together.



**Apply for the job**
---------------------



This is what you can expect from our hiring process.



After you apply, the Team Lead will review your profile and reach out for a short introduction call if there's a match. From there: an interview, a short assessment that you'll present to the team were you also have the change to ask all the qustions you have. If both sides are enthusiastic, we move forward with an offer.



We keep the process clear, personal and focused on getting to know each other properly.

title: Senior Software Engineer
description:
**Your role**

**oT Edge \& Data Center Integration*** Design and deploy **Azure IoT Edge** workloads running on data center gateways/servers to ingest telemetry from:
	+ BMS/BAS systems
	+ Power systems (UPS, PDUs, ATS, Generators)
	+ Cooling and mechanical systems
	+ Environmental sensors (temperature, humidity, airflow, water leak)
	+ IT infrastructure (SNMP, Modbus, BACnet, OPC\-UA)
* Build **MQTT\-based ingestion pipelines** to securely stream telemetry from local DCIM collectors into the Azure cloud.
* Implement local processing logic for buffering, aggregation, transformation, and on\-premise failover.

**Cloud Data Pipeline Engineering*** Develop end‑to‑end data flows using **Azure IoT Hub, Event Hub, Stream Analytics, Azure Functions, Data Explorer, and Storage** .
* Build scalable and secure APIs and microservices to expose telemetry for customers, partners, and internal services.
* Implement **real\-time alarming and event processing** in the cloud using serverless compute.
* Integrate telemetry into analytics platforms to support:
	+ Predictive maintenance
	+ Capacity forecasting
	+ Energy efficiency AI models
	+ SLA/uptime reporting

**Platform Reliability \& Operations*** Implement robust monitoring, diagnostics, and observability using **Log Analytics, Azure Monitor, and Application Insights** .
* Troubleshoot connectivity, protocol translation, cloud ingestion, and Edge deployment issues.
* Ensure configuration management and version control of IoT Edge modules.

**Security \& Compliance*** Implement strong end‑to‑end security across:
	+ Device identity and certificates
	+ Encrypted MQTT communication
	+ Secure onboarding with DPS
	+ Azure RBAC and Key Vault\-based secrets management
* Ensure solutions meet data center security policies and customer data governance requirements.

**Collaboration \& Documentation*** Partner with DC Operations, Facilities, Product Management, Data Science, and Customer Engineering teams.
* Document architecture, deployment processes, and support handover materials.
Contribute to design standards and best practices for DCIM modernization.  
* 

**What you’ll need**

**Technical Skills*** Strong hands\-on experience with:
	+ **Azure IoT Hub, IoT Edge, IoT Hub Device Provisioning Service**
	+ **MQTT protocol** and edge\-to\-cloud messaging
	+ **Azure Functions, Event Hub, Stream Analytics, Azure Data Explorer (Kusto)**
	+ Container development (Docker) and Edge module creation
	+ C\#, Python, Node.js, or Go for backend and edge services
* Familiarity with data center protocols and devices:
	+ **Modbus RTU/TCP, BACnet/IP, SNMP, OPC\-UA**
	+ Environmental sensors and telemetry networks
* Experience with CI/CD pipelines (Azure DevOps or GitHub Actions)
* Knowledge of IaC (Bicep, ARM, Terraform)

**Experience*** Prior experience in **data center infrastructure** , **building systems** , or **industrial IoT** environments.
* Designing event\-driven cloud architectures for real\-time monitoring.
* Building resilient telemetry ingestion systems.
* Working with operational technology (OT) in secure environments.

title: AI Engineer (EdTech) - Student Worker
description:
Studocu helps millions of students find and share the study materials they need. We have 50M\+ monthly active users, and we're building Studocu AI: a set of AI\-powered features that make studying faster and more effective. Think course companions, diagnostic exams, and smart content recommendations, all powered by LLMs and agentic systems.

**The Role**


We're looking for a working student who wants to get their hands dirty building AI features that real students will use. You won't be fetching coffee or organizing spreadsheets. You'll be writing Python, working with LLMs/Langfuse/Langgraph and shipping code alongside our AI Engineering and Data Science team.


This is a role for someone who's already tinkering with AI on their own: building side projects, experimenting with APIs, breaking things and figuring out why. We care less about your grades and more about what you've built. This opening is strictly not an internship.

**What you'll actually do**


You'll work on real features within Studocu AI (studocu.com/ai). Depending on your skills and what's in flight, that could look like:

* Building and testing prompt chains and agent workflows in Langgraph
* Prototyping new AI features (evaluation tools, content processing pipelines, conversational flows)
* Running evaluations on model outputs writing scoring logic, comparing approaches, spotting failure modes
* Helping improve our document processing and retrieval pipelines
* Contributing to internal tools that help the team move faster


You'll be paired with a Senior AI engineer who will review your code, give you context, and make sure you're learning, but you'll be expected to own your work and push it forward.

 **Must\-haves:**

* Eligible to work in the Netherlands. We do not provide any sponsorships for this role.
* Currently enrolled in a Bachelor's or Master's programme (Computer Science, AI, Data Science, Math or similar)
* Comfortable writing code
* Familiar with LLM APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic, or similar). You've called one from code, not just used ChatGPT
* You've built something with AI outside of coursework. A side project, a hackathon entry, a tool you made for yourself
* Available for at least 16 hours per week for a minimum of 6 months

 **Very nice\-to\-haves (hey, we have to dream):**

* Experience with frameworks like LangChain, LangGraph, or similar orchestration tools
* Familiarity with FastAPI or other async Python web frameworks
* Exposure to vector databases (Milvus, Pinecone, Weaviate, etc.)
* Basic understanding of evaluation and monitoring for LLM applications
* You've deployed something to production, even if it was small

title: AI Automation Engineer
description:
*AFS Group is growing! Therefore, we are looking for an AI Automation Engineer who is curious, takes initiatives and has the passion to automate business processes with AI. Would you like to contribute to the growth of our company? We would love to get to know you better!*


The AFS Interest Rates Division has roots dating back 175 years and continues to expand in both its core established and new markets. In total AFS Group counts more than 175 employees, with ambitious growth plans centered on how to best serve our customers in this dynamic, ever\-changing, and fast\-paced markets. The AFS Interest Rates Division consists of a group of 40\+ ambitious and motivated professionals across Money \& Capital Markets and Fixed Income providing best in class solutions to serve a variety of public sector, corporate, banking, and institutional clients.


At AFS Group, our values drive how we work and grow together. We are committed to being knowledgeable in our field, collaborative in our approach, entrepreneurial in our mindset, accurate in our execution, and ethical in all our dealings.

  

We are seeking talented Brokers to help grow and deepen relationships with corporates, governments, and public institutions across the Asia. You’ll be supported by AFS’ robust product suite, as well as the expertise and network of our experienced colleagues. The Interest Asia desk specializes in brokering deposits, commercial paper (CP), certificates of deposit (CD), and other short\-term interest rate instruments. We also facilitate loans, medium\-term notes (MTNs), and private placements in the capital markets on behalf of our core clients. More broadly, the Interest Rates Division is active across the following product areas:

  

* Interbank and Non\-banking Deposits
* Certificates of Deposits (CD) \& Commercial Paper (CP)
* Repurchase Agreements
* Arbitrage
* Foreign Exchange (mainly FX\-Swaps)
* Interest Rate Derivatives
* Treasury Bills
* Medium Term Notes \& Structured Bonds
* Private Placements \& Structured Loans
* Exploring AI use cases within the business
* Work with teams to identify processes where AI can help
* Building AI Solutions from idea to prototype, to a working solution
* Connecting systems and automating processes
* Testing and implementing new AI applications within AFS
* We’re not looking for a traditional data scientist, but someone who builds AI tools and automation solutions

**Who we looking for**

* 0–2 years of experience
* Study background in e.g. Artificial Intelligence, Computer Science, Data Science, Econometrics, Engineering, Mathematics, Physics
* Strong interest in AI and automation
* Builder mindset
* Able to create prototypes quickly
* Works independently and proactively
* Quickly learn new tools
* Able to communicate effectively with non\-technical teams

**Technical skills**

* Able to read Python
* API integrations
* SQL / databases (basic understanding)
* Basic data analysis
* LLM APIs (OpenAI / Gemini / Anthropic)

**Nice to have**

* Automation tools (n8n)
* Dashboards
* Cloud basics
* Vector databases / RAG

**What we offer**

* A unique workplace on the Stock Exchange floor in Amsterdam.
* A diverse, international, and ever\-growing work environment with highly driven teams.
* Space for your refreshing and entrepreneurial ideas to help grow our business.
* Training sessions, coaching and development opportunities for your personal growth.
* Bi\-annual performance\-based bonus scheme.
* International events and congresses, to help you build your network and drive better sales.
* 27 paid days off per year.
* Depending on where you live, an NS business card or bike lease options.
* In\-house gym paid by AFS.

 **Get in touch!**


Are you ready for a new challenge by becoming a member of this motivated team on the Amsterdam Stock Exchange? Please send your resumé through the application link. The Corporate Recruiter in charge is Saranya Nihot. If possible, we could prefer you to add a link to a portfolio website or github page.

 **Application process**


1st round: Job interview with Corporate Recruiter Saranya Nihot


2nd round: Job interview with Head of IT \& Infrastructure \& Head of Energy

 *We are happy to recruit our AFS colleagues by ourselves. We do not need help from external parties. If we receive resumes from unaffiliated recruitment agencies, we reserve the right to contact the people involved directly and treat candidates as regular candidates.*

title: Senior Fullstack Engineer
description:
**About Us**


Scaler is a sustainability data platform built for the real estate industry. We give real estate managers and investors the data they need to protect asset value, meet reporting obligations, and reduce long\-term risk. Our product is data\-heavy, increasingly built on LLMs, and operates in a domain where data errors carry real financial consequences.

**The role**


We're looking for a senior fullstack engineer who builds AI\-powered features in production. You'll own significant parts of the product end to end, from system design to the final interface, working directly with product and designers to turn complex data into tools clients actually use.


You'll also help raise the technical bar across the team through code reviews, architecture input, and engineering standards that keep the codebase clean as we grow.

**What you'll do**

* Design and ship full\-stack features across a data\-intensive platform used by real estate investment teams
* Build and maintain features that put LLMs to work in production, including RAG pipelines, LLM integrations, guardrails, and evaluation frameworks
* Lead architectural decisions for backend systems built to handle continued growth in data volume and client load
* Set engineering standards across code reviews, testing, monitoring, and observability

**What you'll bring**

* Minimum 5 years of fullstack engineering experience with a track record of shipping production systems
* Deep experience in Python and JavaScript/TypeScript with strong command of CSS
* Production experience with LLM integration, including prompt engineering, RAG pipelines, function calling, evals, or guardrails
* Experience with one or more: FastAPI, Laravel, Vue.js, Tailwind CSS, ECharts
* Proven ability to work with large, complex datasets and build systems that surface them clearly
* Experience with web metrics, monitoring, and observability tooling
* Strong fundamentals in data structures and algorithms, applied to real engineering constraints
* Works well in a small, fast\-moving team and owns outcomes, not just tickets

**Our tech stack**

* Front\-end: Vue.js, Pinia, Vite, Tailwind CSS, ECharts
* Back\-end: Laravel, Python, FastAPI
* Infrastructure: AWS, Kafka, Redis, Postgres, Nginx, Envoyer, Docker
* Tools: Sentry, Linear, GitHub, Notion

**Why Scaler?**
===============


When you join Scaler, you will collaborate with a team of curious, sharp, supportive, and genuinely enthusiastic individuals about Scaler's product and unique value. Our people are committed to making a positive impact on our customers' journey to achieving absolute zero carbon.


At Scaler, we’re committed to building a workplace where everyone belongs. Employment opportunities are open to all, regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law


Compensation Range: €75K \- €100K

title: Senior Platform Engineer (Infrastructure)
description:
**About Gelato**
----------------


Gelato has created the world’s largest global network for on\-demand production of custom products – from t\-shirts and mugs to books and wall art. We empower a new generation of ecommerce entrepreneurs to share their creativity worldwide while embracing local, sustainable production. By producing locally and perfectly matching supply with demand, we eliminate waste and reduce carbon emissions.


At Gelato, we don’t own production facilities – we build the software that connects them. With over 140 production partners in 32 countries, our network can deliver custom products to five billion people in just 72 hours. It’s smarter, faster, and greener.


With GelatoConnect, our SaaS platform, we’re driving innovation in print production. GelatoConnect simplifies operations for print producers by automating procurement, workflows, and logistics into one seamless system. By boosting efficiency and cutting costs, it helps businesses scale to meet market demands. With GelatoConnect, we’re reshaping the print industry to be more efficient, sustainable, and profitable.

**Platform**
------------

**Gelato** is an **AI\-first**, cloud\-native platform transforming local, on\-demand production and delivery — with zero physical assets. We power:

* **Global production orchestration**: connecting e\-commerce customers to 130\+ partners across 32 countries. From AI\-guided plate design to smart routing and logistics, we deliver to over 5 billion people in under 72 hours—faster, greener, smarter.
* **GelatoConnect**: our AI\-driven print production OS that helps producers master digital printing — from inventory to shipping — by automating every step: procurement, prepress, printing, packaging, and dispatch. It’s machine\-agnostic, real\-time, and built for uptime, precision, and profitability.

**AI at the Core**
------------------


We are not just early adopters of AI — we’re **AI\-native builders**. Across engineering, product, and operations, we embrace AI to accelerate innovation:

* **AI\-first development** using LLMs for code generation, testing, documentation, and design exploration.
* **Autonomous AI agents** driving platform resilience, observability, cost control, and internal workflow automation.
* **AI\-native product features** built into GelatoConnect and the core platform — improving routing, personalization, and production optimization.
* A culture of **continuous experimentation** with RAG, agent orchestration, prompt engineering, and model fine\-tuning.

**Responsibilities**
--------------------

* Ensure 24/7 platform operations, including on\-call support and incident response.
* Build and evolve **AI agents** that automate scaling, recovery, and diagnostics through control\-plane patterns and event\-driven logic.
* Manage **multi\-cloud infrastructure**, including serverless, through declarative, automated workflows.
* Collaborate with the **Delivery Platform** team to improve DevEx with intelligent internal tooling.
* Drive **reliability, observability, and cost\-efficiency** across Gelato’s global infrastructure.
* Enable engineers with **self\-service, secure, and scalable delivery pipelines**.

**Qualifications**
------------------

* Deep understanding of **Linux fundamentals** (processes, I/O, filesystems, networking, memory management, system internals).
* Deep experience with **AWS** (primary) **and GCP** (bonus), including cost optimizations, EKS, networking, S3, VPC peering, IAM, and related services.
* Strong understanding of **Kubernetes internals**, including networking, security, and cluster operations.
* Hands\-on experience with **GitOps workflows** (e.g. ArgoCD) and **Infrastructure as Code** using Terraform.
* Proficient in **Python, Go**, or other languages — with a willingness to learn Go if not already familiar.
* Comfortable using **AI development tools** like Cursor, Claude, and coding with LLMs.


Experience with or strong interest in building **AI agents and RAG workflows**, with a commitment to learn if needed.

**What it’s like to work at Gelato**
------------------------------------


We are a customer\-obsessed team with the ambition to change the world by connecting technology to the printing industry and making it much more sustainable. Everyone who joins our team must feel genuinely intrigued and motivated by our mission. We expect a lot. We are a driven team with big goals, so we seek individuals who are genuinely passionate about their work and possess an entrepreneurial spirit. Our culture is unique and we live by our values, so it's worth learning more about our culture and how we work before presenting your application.


At Gelato, we pride ourselves on our global presence with 14 offices worldwide, fostering a dynamic and diverse work environment. Rooted in a culture that values collaboration, creativity, and camaraderie, we actively cultivate a company culture that thrives on shared experiences. We encourage team members to embrace this culture by working from our inspiring office spaces at least three days a week, allowing for meaningful connections and collective growth.


Lastly, we ask that you please upload your CV in **English**, regardless of which country you are applying from.

title: Data & AI Architect
description:
Data \& AI Architect**At a glance**
---------------


Do you have a strong passion for data and do you agree that data is at the core of creating value for customers? Are you energized by tackling complex data\-related challenges? Do you enjoy collaborating with a team and engaging with stakeholders across the bank? If your answer is yes, we have an exciting opportunity for you in our Domain Architecture organization.

**Your job**
------------


You will work in the Domain Architecture Team of Daily Banking Grid in Transaction Banking value cluster. The architecture team is pivotal in defining and executing architectural frameworks, and cutting\-edge technologies to ensure our IT assets are strategically aligned with business objectives and maximize organizational value.


As a Data Architect, you will be responsible for:

* Develop and maintain the data architecture for Transaction Banking value cluster, ensuring alignment with business goals and architecture vision of ABN AMRO.
* Advocate for data lake house architecture and promote its values.
* Author and maintain architectural documents like HLD, LLD and DFD.
* Collaborate with the central data office and business stakeholders to understand data requirements and translate them into technical solutions.
* Collaborate with IT, business units, and external partners to ensure data architecture aligns with business needs.
* Define and establish data management KPIs, OKRs and procedures to ensure data quality, consistency, and security.
* Design and develop conceptual, logical, and physical data models supporting integration, warehousing, and analytics initiatives.
* Simplify and socialize data governance policies to ensure compliance with regulatory requirements and data privacy standards.
* Stay informed about emerging trends and technologies in data architecture and management.
* Monitor and optimize data architecture performance, scalability, and efficiency.
* Work with cross\-functional teams to establish roles and responsibilities across central and domain teams.
**Working environment**
-----------------------


As a Data Architect, you will play a crucial role in shaping the future landscape of data domain within the Transaction Banking cluster. Your expertise in Azure architecture or similar hyper\-scaler cloud platforms will be essential as you design and implement robust, scalable data solutions. You'll leverage Databricks or equivalent data engineering platforms to streamline data processing and analytics, ensuring our systems are both efficient and future ready.

  

Your enthusiasm for emerging technologies like Microsoft Fabric, serverless architectures etc. will help drive innovation within our data integration processes, fostering agile and interconnected data environments. As a Generative AI practitioner, you will play a transformative role in advancing our data initiatives, exploring new methodologies for data analysis, reporting and insights generation.

  

Key Deliverables:

* Strategic Data Architecture Design
* Technology Leadership
* Collaboration and Influence
* Regulatory Compliance and Governance
* Innovation and Thought Leadership
* Scalable Solutions Development
**Your profile**
----------------


Must haves:

* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, or a related field.
* Proven experience as a Data Architect or in a similar role, with a strong portfolio of successful data architecture projects.
* Expertise in Data Engineering, data modeling, and software design.
* Familiarity with industry leading frameworks like DAMA\-DMBOK, DCAM etc.
* Practitioner in data management with implementation experience in Azure, Databricks\-Unity Catalog, Alation, Atlan, Collibra, Purview, IDMC, or related tools.
* Strong analytical and problem\-solving skills, with the ability to work in a fast\-paced environment.
* Generative AI practitioner with knowledge of AI registry, EU Act, cognitive architecture, RAG agents, and XOps (AIOps).
* Knowledge of banking and financial services industry\-specific data regulations and compliance requirements.
* Excellent communication and collaboration skills.
* Collaborative, approachable, and open to learning and educating.
* Accountable and ambitious, with a drive for quality and a pace for execution delivery.
* Ability to zoom out and zoom in based on problem statements and audience mix.
* You are fluent in English and located in the Netherlands.

  

Good to haves:

* Togaf and Archimate certified
**We are offering**
-------------------

* The gross monthly salary displayed above is based on a 36\-hour work week, including vacation pay and benefit budget.
* The Benefit Budget is 11% of your salary. The Benefit Budget allows you to acquire additional employment benefits. If you make no purchases or reservations in the Benefit Shop in a given month, you are paid one twelfth of your Benefit Budget that month.
* Five weeks of vacation per year. You have the option to purchase an additional four weeks per year.
* Personal development Budget of € 1,000 per year, which you can accumulate up to € 3,000\.
* Possibility to work from home (in consultation with your team and depending on your position).
* An annual public transport pass with free public transportation throughout the Netherlands.
* An excellent pension scheme.
* Banking for better days. These are days you can use for your personal development or on which you can contribute to society.
**Interested?**
---------------


Are you interested? Then apply for this vacancy. For more information, contact Gagan Saxena via gagan.saxena@nl.abnamro.com. We look forward to meeting you!

title: Strategy Senior Associate - Merchant Value & Pricing, EMEA
description:
**About the Role**  

  

The Strategy team within Delivery Commercial Operations (DCO) enables data\-driven decision\-making and strategic direction for Uber's delivery business. As a Commercial Strategy Senior Associate, you will play a key role in driving deep dives, business optimizations and coordinating large regional programs related to commercial strategy and merchant value generation. You will work within defined models to help identify opportunities for business growth and provide analytical support for forecasting and planning.
  

  

This is an L4 (Senior Associate) level role, ideal for an analytical professional ready to support us in driving commercial strategy, with immediate focus on value generation and merchant pricing.
  

  

**What you'll do*** **Drive Analytics and Deep Dives:** Perform broad analysis and translate into deep dives and executive presentations to support broader strategic initiatives.
* **Maintain Reporting \& Dashboards:** Build cross\-market reporting framework and dashboards to monitor key performance indicators (KPIs) and trends related to commercial strategy and revenue generation.
* **Support Strategic Planning:** Assist in the analysis of performance data to support forecasting, planning, and prioritization efforts alongside commercial leaders.
* **Collaborate Cross\-Functionally:** Collaborate with immediate team members and stakeholders in Sales Operations, Finance, and Product to ensure data accuracy and alignment on tactical work.
* **Generate Insights:** Interpret core sales metrics and data sources to provide data summaries and clear updates to the team regarding business performance.
* **Pricing Analytics and Project Management:** Scale and build pricing models and initiatives cross multiple markets.

**What you'll need*** **Analytical Capability \& Data Fluency:** You understand core sales metrics and data sources. You are proficient in SQL and Excel/Google Sheets for data extraction, manipulation, and dashboarding, and you can produce forecast inputs accurately.
* **Business \& Functional Expertise:** You possess a foundational understanding of basic GTM and SaaS concepts and can utilize data tools with support to analyze performance.
* **Strategic Thinking \& Execution:** You can support strategy projects and contribute to tactical execution with direction, connecting your specific tasks to broader team priorities.
* **Operational Excellence:** You follow established planning processes and assist in maintaining reporting tools to ensure reliability.
* **Communication:** You share data and findings clearly in team meetings using structured templates and standard reporting formats.
* **Innovation \& Problem Solving:** You are able to break down basic problems and contribute to brainstorming solutions for immediate business questions.

**Preferred qualifications*** **Experience:** 3\-5 years of experience in analytics, strategy, sales operations, or a related field.
* **Education:** Bachelor's degree in Business, Economics, Finance, Engineering, or a related field.
* **Technical Proficiency:**
	+ **SQL:** Proficiency in SQL for data extraction and manipulation is required.
	+ **Spreadsheets:** advanced proficiency in Microsoft Excel and Google Sheets.

title: Warehouse Accounting Specialist Recruitment
description:
BYD Europe is a key player in the global electric mobility revolution, dedicated to providing high\-quality fully electric buses (E\-Buses) and electric trucks (E\-Trucks) to customers across Europe. To support our after\-sales service excellence and ensure the smooth operation of spare parts supply, our Commercial Vehicle Spare Parts Department is now seeking a detail\-oriented and analytical Warehouse Accounting Specialist to join our team in Zevenbergen, The Netherlands.

### **Job Overview**


As a Warehouse Accounting Specialist, you will be responsible for maintaining accurate inventory records, reconciling system data with physical stock, and driving continuous improvement in inventory control processes. Your work will directly contribute to ensuring high inventory accuracy, supporting efficient warehouse operations, and aligning with the company’s financial policies.


Our spare parts warehouse in the Netherlands is strategically located to deliver timely support to our customers, and your role will be critical in keeping inventory under control and optimizing stock management.

### **Key Job Responsibilities**

* Perform regular inventory reconciliation between SAP and WMS stock, ensuring full alignment between system records and physical inventory.
* Analyze inventory discrepancies, conduct in\-depth root\-cause investigations, and propose practical corrective actions to prevent recurrence.
* Support warehouse cycle counts and annual full stocktaking processes, ensuring high inventory accuracy and compliance with company standards.
* Identify and resolve system exceptions or data inconsistencies in SAP and WMS systems promptly to avoid operational disruptions.
* Collaborate closely with warehouse operations teams to optimize inventory control procedures and enhance reporting accuracy.
* Analyze inventory data and results, and work closely with the Finance Department to ensure financial compliance and transparency.
* Proactively identify opportunities for process improvements in inventory management, stock rotation, and data reporting.
* Ensure proper stock rotation following FIFO (First\-In\-First\-Out) and FEFO (First\-Expired\-First\-Out) principles to maintain product integrity and quality.
* Prepare and submit inventory adjustment reports for approval, ensuring all adjustments are fully documented and compliant with company financial policies.

### **Required Qualifications \& Skills**

* Fluent in both Chinese and English (written and spoken) for daily communication, reporting, and cross\-departmental collaboration.
* Strong proficiency in Excel or other spreadsheet tools, with advanced skills in data analysis, pivot tables, and report creation.
* Excellent ability to analyze operational data, identify patterns, and conduct root\-cause analysis.
* Previous experience with SAP and WMS systems is highly preferred.
* Knowledge of Power BI for data visualization and reporting is an advantage.
* Experience with Python programming for data analysis or process automation is a plus.
* HBO (Hoger Beroepsonderwijs) education level or equivalent.
* Outstanding analytical skills and a strong attention to detail.
* A minimum of 3 years of experience in data analysis, inventory accounting, or related fields.
* High level of accuracy and reliability in handling numerical data and documentation.

### **Job Details**

* Location: Zevenbergen, The Netherlands
* Employment Type: Full Time
* Working Hours: 07:30 – 16:30 (daily)
* Reporting To: Warehouse Manager

### **Why Join BYD Europe?**


Join a global leader in electric mobility and be part of a dynamic team driving sustainable transportation in Europe. We offer a competitive salary package, opportunities for professional growth, and a collaborative work environment where your contributions make a difference. At BYD, you will work with cutting\-edge technology and contribute to a greener future.


If you meet the above requirements and are passionate about inventory management and data analysis, we look forward to receiving your application!

Our culture is built on respect, ownership, and collaboration. We move fast, support each other, and celebrate wins together.

title: Information Security Analyst / Engineer
description:
**Location**  

The **Information Security Analyst / Engineer** will support our globally distributed **Information Security** operations, working remotely and collaborating with the Head of InfoSec and key stakeholders around the world. This role will be based **remotely**, in Israel (full\-time employee) or in Eastern Europe (contractors).


**Who We Are**  

DoiT is a global technology company that works with cloud\-driven organizations to leverage the cloud to drive business growth and innovation. We combine data, technology, and human expertise to ensure our customers operate in a well\-architected and scalable state \- from planning to production.



Delivering DoiT Cloud Intelligence, the only solution that integrates advanced technology with human intelligence, we help our customers solve complex multicloud problems and drive efficiency.



With decades of multicloud experience, we have specializations in Kubernetes, GenAI, CloudOps, and more. An award\-winning strategic partner of AWS, Google Cloud, and Microsoft Azure, we work alongside more than 4,000 customers worldwide.


**The Opportunity**  

This is an exciting opportunity to join DoiT's Information Security team and play a crucial role in protecting our global operations, customer data, and cloud infrastructure. Reporting to the Head of InfoSec, you will be responsible for day\-to\-day security operations, threat monitoring, vulnerability management, and supporting security initiatives across our multi\-cloud environment.



The successful candidate should be highly detail\-oriented with a strong security mindset, focused on building robust, scalable security processes. A high degree of collaboration is required, working cross\-functionally with IT Operations, Engineering, Sales, and Client Services teams, as well as externally with security vendors and compliance partners.


**Responsibilities**



Security Operations:


* Monitor security alerts, incidents, and threats across DoiT's global infrastructure
* Conduct security assessments and vulnerability scans for cloud environments and applications
* Investigate and respond to security incidents, coordinating with relevant teams for remediation
* Maintain and update security documentation, playbooks, and incident response procedures
* Support compliance efforts including SOC2, ISO 27001, and customer security assessments
* Assist with security awareness training and education initiatives across the organization


Cloud Security Management:


* Implement and maintain security controls across AWS, Google Cloud, and Microsoft Azure environments
* Configure and monitor cloud security tools including SIEM, CASB, and vulnerability scanners
* Review cloud architecture designs and provide security recommendations
* Support secure configuration management and infrastructure as code practices
* Monitor cloud access patterns and investigate anomalous activities


Governance and Compliance:


* Assist with security policy development and implementation
* Support vendor security assessments and due diligence processes
* Maintain security metrics and reporting for leadership and compliance requirements
* Participate in security audits and provide evidence for compliance frameworks
* Help develop and test business continuity and disaster recovery plans


Collaboration and Support:


* Work closely with IT Operations team on security\-related projects and initiatives
* Provide security guidance to development and engineering teams
* Support procurement processes by reviewing security requirements for new tools and services
* Collaborate with external security consultants and penetration testing teams
* Participate in cross\-functional incident response and crisis management activities


**Qualification**


* 2\-4 years of experience in information security, cybersecurity, or related field
* Experience with **cloud security** in AWS, Google Cloud, and/or Microsoft Azure environments
* Knowledge of security frameworks and standards (NIST, ISO 27001, SOC2, etc.)
* Experience with security tools such as SIEM, vulnerability scanners, endpoint protection, and security monitoring platforms
* Understanding of network security, encryption, identity and access management, and security best practices
* Familiarity with compliance requirements and audit processes
* Strong analytical and problem\-solving skills with attention to detail
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills
* Ability to work effectively in a remote, globally distributed team environment
* Security certifications preferred (Security\+, GSEC, CCSP, or equivalent)
* Experience with scripting/automation (Python, PowerShell, etc.) is a plus
* Bachelor's degree in Information Security, Computer Science, or related field preferred

Be your truest self. Work on your terms. Make a difference.

title: Staff Backend Engineer, AI Platform - 100% Remote - EMEA
description:
**NOTE: This is a FULLY remote role, but the candidate must be within EMEA to collaborate with their team, peers, and internal customers. You do not have to be in the specific country or city shown in this listing, but** **please only apply if you are physically based within EMEA.**


Trusted by 20,000\+ property managers worldwide, Hostaway is an industry leading, AI\-powered vacation rental management platform designed for professional short\-term rental operators. Hostaway brings everything together for greater efficiency and faster growth.

  

Profitable, high\-growth, and the first short\-term rental Property Management System unicorn . Join us at our most exciting stage yet! Learn more about our recent valuation and story here.

### **About the role**


We're building Hostaway's AI Platform \- the foundational infrastructure that will power every AI\-driven feature across our product. This is not a feature team bolting AI onto existing workflows. It's a platform team building the agentic framework that enables every engineering team at Hostaway to ship reliable, production\-grade AI capabilities.


As a Staff Engineer, you'll own the architecture and technical direction of this platform. You'll lead the design and implementation of a multi\-agent system that includes an agent orchestrator, LLM gateway, prompt and tool versioning, evaluation framework, and end\-to\-end observability. Your work will directly determine how effectively Hostaway can deliver AI\-powered experiences to over 50,000 property managers and their guests.


This is a high\-autonomy, high\-impact role. You'll report directly to engineering leadership and collaborate closely with product, design, and engineering teams across the company. You'll inherit a well\-defined architecture and a strong technical foundation \- your job is to take ownership, evolve it, and scale it as the platform matures and adoption grows.

### **What you’ll do:**

* Own the AI Platform architecture, lead the technical vision for the multi\-agent system \- agent delegator, sub\-agents, config service, LLM gateway, evaluation framework, conversation history, and observability stack.
* Build production\-grade AI infrastructure, design and implement the core services that make AI features reliable, versioned, observable, and safe to ship at scale.
* Drive the evaluation and quality story, establish quality gates, prompt comparison workflows, hallucination detection, and CI/CD integration so that every AI feature ships with measurable confidence.
* Shape the LLM gateway strategy, ensure provider failover, model routing, cost tracking, and rate limiting are handled centrally \- eliminating duplicated effort across teams.
* Champion cross\-team adoption, work with product teams across Hostaway to make the AI Platform easy to adopt. Publish internal blueprints, define integration patterns, and ensure teams can build specialized agents without deep platform knowledge.
* Influence engineering\-wide practices, drive best practices for prompt engineering, tool design, observability, and agent testing across the organization.
* Mentor and elevate engineers, raise the technical bar across the AI team and beyond \- through code review, architectural guidance, and hands\-on pairing.

  

* 8\+ years of software engineering experience, with at least 2 years operating at a Staff or equivalent level.
* Deep Python expertise. This platform is built in Python \- you should be highly proficient and opinionated about writing production\-grade Python services.
* Production experience with LLM\-based systems. You've built, shipped, and operated AI features or platforms that serve real users at scale. You understand the operational realities: prompt versioning, evaluation, cost management, observability, and failure modes.
* Strong architectural instincts. You can design systems that start simple and evolve gracefully. You know when to keep components in a single service and when to extract. You make pragmatic trade\-offs between speed and extensibility.
* Familiarity with the modern AI tooling ecosystem. Experience with frameworks and libraries such as PydanticAI, LangChain, LangGraph, LiteLLM, Langfuse, Phoenix, MLflow, or comparable tools. You don't need to know all of them, but you should be able to evaluate and integrate them with confidence.
* Multi\-agent architecture experience is a strong plus. If you've designed systems with agent orchestration, tool calling, structured output, and context management, you'll hit the ground running.
* Comfort working across a polyglot stack. The AI Platform is Python, but it doesn't exist in isolation. Hostaway's product includes Go services (including existing MCP servers), a PHP monolith, and a React frontend. You don't need to be proficient in all of these, but you should have the curiosity and adaptability to read, understand, and integrate with code across these technologies.
* Infrastructure fluency. Comfortable with AWS, Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines, and operating services in production.
* Cross\-team influence. You lead through clarity and credibility, not authority. You've successfully driven adoption of platforms, patterns, or standards beyond your immediate team.

### **What Success Looks Like:**

* The AI Platform is the trusted foundation for every AI feature at Hostaway \- teams build on it by default, not by exception.
* Prompt changes are versioned, tested, and rolled out with the same rigor as code deploys.
* AI features in production are observable, cost\-tracked, and recoverable \- when something breaks, the team knows within minutes, not days.
* Other engineering teams actively seek your guidance on building AI capabilities \- you're the go\-to technical authority for applied AI at Hostaway.
* The platform scales from the current set of use cases to a broader agent ecosystem without requiring fundamental rearchitecture.

title: Data Scientist

At de Bijenkorf, data plays a central role in how we operate and make decisions, and we continue to expand our capabilities every day. With millions of customers visiting our stores and e\-commerce platform, we manage large and rapidly growing datasets that we use to train machine learning models and generate insights. These insights help us make smarter decisions and create impact across all areas of our business. From customer experience to logistics, assortment, and marketing. Want to help shape what’s next?



About the role


As a Data Scientist, you translate the richness of our customer data into tangible impact across our website, app, online marketing channels, stores, customer service, supply chain, and buying teams. You have the opportunity to improve the shopping experience of millions of customers and build the data products that power better decisions across the entire organization. You will:


* Ideate and develop  

Build scalable machine learning products across various domains, working directly with colleagues to explore and shape data\-driven solutions.
* Deploy and own  

Take models from development to production, owning the full ML ops lifecycle in close collaboration with our tech teams.
* Experiment and iterate  

Continuously improve production models, MLOps flows, and contribute to the broader data platform.
We currently have a number of models in production across different business domains. Examples include recommendation systems, sales and returns forecasting, customer segmentation and lifetime value prediction, and marketing budget optimization. In our latest work, we built a recommender system using a LLM and a multimodal model that combines text and image features, allowing us to create more meaningful recommendations. The Data \& Analytics team supports a diverse range of organizational departments with their data needs, giving you the chance to work with a variety of data sources and use cases.

Proficiency in SQL, experience with dbt is a big plus.  
*

**Who you are:**


* Proactive and able to take ownership of projects end\-to\-end, from idea to production.

title: Principal Engineer - AI domain
description:
At HEMA, we are building an efficient and future\-proof retail technology landscape. To achieve this, we are establishing a new Engineering Organization. This is your chance to help lay the technological foundation for the most iconic, nearly 100\-year\-old department store in the Netherlands. Do you want to make a direct impact on HEMA’s digital progress? Then this role is for you! **the challenge**  

In this role, you are the technical leader within the AI domain. You work closely with software engineers, product managers, and the enterprise architect to turn AI opportunities into real, usable products. You will:* Build HEMA’s internal agentic AI applications. These include knowledge‑driven assistants for HR, IT, store operations and other internal domains built on AWS Bedrock and Agent Core. You design the end‑to‑end solution: frontend interaction, backend logic, AI orchestration and user experience.
* Translate AI capabilities into simple, reliable user experiences. You ensure that complex LLM‑powered workflows result in tools colleagues trust and enjoy using.
* Build the agentic platform that enables all HEMA\-teams to create their own AI agents. You define reusable components, set architectural guardrails, and create the developer experience foundation that scales AI adoption across HEMA.


* Shape strategic AI architecture decisions.You work with AI leadership to determine when we use AWS Bedrock, when to leverage Microsoft Copilot, and when to build or buy external platforms like AgentForce or Candid. You ensure interoperability and long‑term architectural flexibility.


* Act as the technical right hand of the AI strategic lead. You turn conceptual visions into concrete technical choices, evaluate emerging technologies, and help HEMA stay ahead in a rapidly evolving AI\-landscape. By doing so, you bring coherence, clarity and direction to one of HEMA’s fastest‑growing strategic domains.


**what we offer**  

  

  

At HEMA, you’ll experience an environment where people truly work together. You’ll receive proper guidance, useful feedback, and gain valuable experience. Whether you are looking to extend your knowledge and skills or to help others grow, you are welcome here. In addition, at HEMA you’ll get: A competitive salary based on your knowledge and experience.
 30 vacation days (based on a 40\-hour week) and 8% holiday allowance, so you can recharge in time.
 A variable bonus of up to 14% of your annual salary – depending on our collective results.
 A monthly net expense allowance.
 A fixed year\-end bonus of 4% of your annual salary.
️ 15% staff discount on all your HEMA favorites: from tompouce pastries to towels and notebooks.
 A solid pension plan, so you're well taken care of later too.
 Travel allowance of €0\.21 per kilometer (starting from 10 km one\-way, up to a max of 30 km).
 Access to the ‘benefits at work’ platform, with discounts on top brands, day trips, and other extras that make life more fun.  

  

  

  

**this is what you’ll bring**  


You are a Principal‑level engineer who thrives at the intersection of strategy and hands‑on engineering. You love diving into new AI developments, but you are equally strong in simplifying hype and making clear technical decisions. You bring:
* Minimum of 10 years of experience in software engineering, including substantial experience in senior or principal\-level technical roles.
* Proven experience building AI‑enabled or agentic applications (LLMs, structured workflows, retrieval, orchestration).
* Ability to operate as both Principal Engineer and Solution Architect.
* Strong system‑level thinking across frontend, backend and AI layers.
* Experience with AWS Bedrock is preferred, or the ability to learn it rapidly.
* The ability to explain complex topics simply, including demystifying AI hype.
* Curiosity and enthusiasm for emerging models, protocols and tools.
* Comfort working in enterprise‑scale engineering environments.
* Preferably experience in product‑led or startup environments where you owned delivery end‑to‑end.
* Ideally experience building agentic applications using frameworks like Agent Core or similar tools.
**HEMA**  

  

  

At HEMA, over 17,000 colleagues work together to create a better everyday life in a more beautiful world. With products that are more practical, more beautiful, better—and that last longer too. And with colorful stores in towns, cities, and online. We’re proud of how far we’ve come, but we’re not done yet. HEMA is truly HEMA again and ready for the next step. Our ambition? To become a frontrunner in a challenging market. We do this together, as one team, with proud colleagues, entrepreneurs, and partners. By playing to win. That means being curious, seizing opportunities, working together with joy, and always aiming for the best result. You speak up, challenge others, and help each other grow. title: Agile Engineer Data Management
description:

* \#LI\-OMNIA

DLL appreciates the time you spend applying to our openings. We advise only those who qualify for an interview will be contacted. Hiring subject to successful completion of a background check.


DLL is an equal opportunity employer. We are committed to inclusive, barrier\-free recruitment and selection processes and work environments. If contacted for an employment opportunity, please advise Human Resources if you require accommodation in accordance with our values and all applicable legislation.

DLL is a global asset finance company that partners with manufacturers, dealers, distributors, and end users to facilitate access to equipment and technology. We are also a 100% subsidiary of our parent company Rabobank, one of the world’s largest financial companies. Join our community of over 6\.000 members from 75 nationalities! We offer exciting job opportunities where you feel welcomed, respected and empowered to be your authentic self and share your best ideas. At DLL, we believe in the strength of our diverse perspectives and experiences, which make our global community thrive.

title: Senior Software Engineer
description:
**Your role**

**oT Edge \& Data Center Integration*** Design and deploy **Azure IoT Edge** workloads running on data center gateways/servers to ingest telemetry from:
	+ BMS/BAS systems
	+ Power systems (UPS, PDUs, ATS, Generators)
	+ Cooling and mechanical systems
	+ Environmental sensors (temperature, humidity, airflow, water leak)
	+ IT infrastructure (SNMP, Modbus, BACnet, OPC\-UA)
* Build **MQTT\-based ingestion pipelines** to securely stream telemetry from local DCIM collectors into the Azure cloud.
* Implement local processing logic for buffering, aggregation, transformation, and on\-premise failover.

**Cloud Data Pipeline Engineering*** Develop end‑to‑end data flows using **Azure IoT Hub, Event Hub, Stream Analytics, Azure Functions, Data Explorer, and Storage** .
* Build scalable and secure APIs and microservices to expose telemetry for customers, partners, and internal services.
* Implement **real\-time alarming and event processing** in the cloud using serverless compute.
* Integrate telemetry into analytics platforms to support:
	+ Predictive maintenance
	+ Capacity forecasting
	+ Energy efficiency AI models
	+ SLA/uptime reporting

**Platform Reliability \& Operations*** Implement robust monitoring, diagnostics, and observability using **Log Analytics, Azure Monitor, and Application Insights** .
* Troubleshoot connectivity, protocol translation, cloud ingestion, and Edge deployment issues.
* Ensure configuration management and version control of IoT Edge modules.

**Security \& Compliance*** Implement strong end‑to‑end security across:
	+ Device identity and certificates
	+ Encrypted MQTT communication
	+ Secure onboarding with DPS
	+ Azure RBAC and Key Vault\-based secrets management
* Ensure solutions meet data center security policies and customer data governance requirements.

**Collaboration \& Documentation*** Partner with DC Operations, Facilities, Product Management, Data Science, and Customer Engineering teams.
* Document architecture, deployment processes, and support handover materials.
Contribute to design standards and best practices for DCIM modernization.  
* 

**What you’ll need**

**Technical Skills*** Strong hands\-on experience with:
	+ **Azure IoT Hub, IoT Edge, IoT Hub Device Provisioning Service**
	+ **MQTT protocol** and edge\-to\-cloud messaging
	+ **Azure Functions, Event Hub, Stream Analytics, Azure Data Explorer (Kusto)**
	+ Container development (Docker) and Edge module creation
	+ C\#, Python, Node.js, or Go for backend and edge services
* Familiarity with data center protocols and devices:
	+ **Modbus RTU/TCP, BACnet/IP, SNMP, OPC\-UA**
	+ Environmental sensors and telemetry networks
* Experience with CI/CD pipelines (Azure DevOps or GitHub Actions)
* Knowledge of IaC (Bicep, ARM, Terraform)

**Experience*** Prior experience in **data center infrastructure** , **building systems** , or **industrial IoT** environments.
* Designing event\-driven cloud architectures for real\-time monitoring.
* Building resilient telemetry ingestion systems.
* Working with operational technology (OT) in secure environments.

title: Engineer I - Software
description:
### **What you'll do:**

* Participate in complex search\-related projects, from initial concept to deployment.
* Contribute to the stability and scalability of the Search services infrastructure.
* Contribute to system optimizations and improving performance to ensure fast and reliable search results.
* Collaborate closely with cross\-functional teams, to understand requirements and deliver impactful solutions.

### **What you'll need:**

* Understanding of search algorithms, data structures, and system design principles.
* Good problem\-solving skills and a demonstrated ability to tackle complex technical challenges.
* Up to 2 years of professional experience (or none—junior level welcome).
* Experience with cloud platforms such as AWS, Google Cloud, or Azure.
* Understanding of distributed systems and scalability challenges.
* Knowledge of RESTful APIs and microservices architecture.
* Strong communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to work effectively in a team environment.

**What we offer**  

A competitive compensation package, of course.  

Time and resources to grow and develop, including a personal development budget and paid leave for learning days, as well as paid access to e\-learning resources such as O’Reilly and LinkedIn Learning.  

Time to support life outside of work, with enhanced parental leave plus paid leave to care for loved ones and volunteer in local communities.  

  

Work flexibility, where TomTom’ers, in agreement with their manager and team, use both the office and home to focus, collaborate, learn and socialize. It’s all about getting the best out of both worlds – we ask TomTom’ers to come to the office two days a week, and the remaining three are free to be worked in either location.  

Improve your home office with a setup budget and get extra support with a monthly allowance.  

Enjoy options to work from your home country and abroad for a set number of days each year, to visit family and friends, or to simply explore the world we’re mapping.  

Take the holidays you want with a competitive holiday plan, plus an extra day off to celebrate your birthday.  

Join annual events like our Hackathon and DevDays to bring your ideas to life with talented teammates from around the world.  

Become a part of our inclusive global culture and have the chance to collaborate with a diverse community – we have over 80 nationalities at TomTom!  

Find out more about our global benefits and enjoy additional local benefits tailored to your location. **Meet your team**  

We’re Search, a product unit within TomTom’s Location Technology Products technical unit. We develop our Search APIs, integrated into other TomTom products and used by TomTom Automotive and Enterprise to provide businesses with the technologies they need to build next\-generation location experiences. Joining our team, you will use your ambition and expertise to solve complex problems and work with big data to positively impact lives on a global scale.  

  

  

**At TomTom...**  

You’ll help people find their way in the world. In 2004, TomTom revolutionized how the world moves with the introduction of the first portable navigation device. Now, we intend to do it again by engineering the first\-ever real\-time map, the smartest and most useful map on the planet.  

Work with a team of 3,300\+ unique, curious and passionate problem\-solvers. Together, we’ll open up a world of possibilities for car manufacturers, enterprises and developers to help people understand and get closer to the world around them. **After you apply**

To find out more about our application process, check out our hiring FAQs. **TomTom is an equal opportunity employer**  

TomTom is where you can find your place in the world. Every day we welcome, nurture and celebrate differences. Why? Because your uniqueness is what makes you, *you*. No matter your culture or background, you’ll find your impact at TomTom. Research also shows that sometimes women and underrepresented communities can be hesitant to apply for positions unless they believe they meet 100% of the criteria. If you can relate to this, please know that we’d love to hear from you.

We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

Headquartered in Amsterdam and listed on Nasdaq, Nebius has a global footprint with R\&D hubs across Europe, North America, and Israel. The team of over 1400 employees includes more than 400 highly skilled engineers with deep expertise across hardware and software engineering, as well as an in\-house AI R\&D team.

**Start date**: June 2026

### **The role**



We are looking for an Early Talent to develop cloud\-based integrations on Microsoft Azure. You will work with experienced engineers and gain hands\-on experience building API\-based and cloud\-native integration solutions.


**We expect you to have**


* 0–2 years of experience with Microsoft Azure (study projects, internships, or junior roles count).
* Basic understanding of **cloud concepts** (compute, storage, networking).
* Familiarity with **Infrastructure as Code** (Terraform / Bicep / ARM) — even at learning or pet\-project level.
* Basic experience with **CI/CD concepts** (e.g., GitHub Actions, Azure DevOps, or similar).
* Understanding of:  

	+ Azure Networking basics (VNet, NSG, public/private access)
	+ Compute basics (VMs, containers)
	+ Storage services
* Awareness of identity concepts (RBAC, basics of Microsoft Entra ID).
* Basic scripting skills (PowerShell / Bash / Python — even simple scripts).
* Interest in monitoring and logging (Azure Monitor, Log Analytics — basic exposure is enough).
* Understanding of **cloud fundamentals, security basics, and cost awareness**.
* English: Intermediate.


**Nice to Have**


* Basic exposure to **containers or Kubernetes**.
* Hands\-on labs or projects with **AKS**.
* Azure fundamentals certification (AZ\-900\) or willingness to obtain it.
* Participation in personal/cloud projects (GitHub portfolio is a big plus).


**Your responsibilities will include**


* Assist in managing Azure environments and subscriptions.
* Support infrastructure deployments using **Infrastructure as Code**.
* Help build and maintain **CI/CD pipelines** under supervision.
* Assist with configuration of networking and access controls.
* Monitor system health and report issues.
* Support cost optimization and resource cleanup.
* Follow and help enforce **Azure policies and governance**.
* Collaborate with engineering teams on cloud\-related tasks.
* Maintain and update documentation.


**What we offer**


* Competitive salary and comprehensive benefits package.
* Mentorship from experienced AI, ML, and cloud infrastructure professionals.

title: Junior IT Support Engineer (f/m/x)
description:
**About the role: What's in the Box**



As a **Junior IT Engineer** within our Benelux Operations tribe, you will support the team responsible for keeping technology across our production facility running smoothly. You will play a key role in ensuring colleagues receive the right hardware, access, and support to do their work effectively.



In this role, you will primarily focus on the practical side of workplace IT. You will help prepare and configure laptops, support onboarding and offboarding processes, and assist colleagues with day\-to\-day hardware and access questions. Working closely with our IT Engineers and Operations teams, you will gain hands\-on experience in a fast\-paced production and logistics environment.



You will be based **fulltime on\-site** at our Bleiswijk Distribution Center and collaborate with colleagues across Benelux to support reliable, secure workplace technology. Occasionally, you may be required to travel to some of our logistics hubs across the Netherlands and Belgium.


*Please note: Visa sponsorship is not available for this role.*


**What you'll do: The Recipe**


* Support the onboarding and offboarding process by preparing, configuring, and collecting company devices such as laptops, phones, and accessories
* Assist colleagues with day\-to\-day IT requests related to hardware, accounts, and basic troubleshooting
* Help manage the lifecycle of company devices, including setup, maintenance, repairs, and inventory tracking
* Support the IT team in maintaining workplace technology such as laptops, printers, and peripherals across the Distribution Center and office
* Work with tools such as Google Workspace, Slack, Azure (Entra ID), and device management platforms to assist with user setup and access management
* Collaborate with IT Engineers and Operations teams to resolve IT issues and ensure employees have the tools they need to work effectively
* Contribute to keeping documentation and asset records up to date


**What you'll bring: The Ingredients**


* You have graduated from a relevant study program (for example IT, Computer Science, Information Systems, or a related field)
* You have a passion for computer hardware and operating systems such as Windows or macOS
* You enjoy solving practical problems and helping colleagues with technical questions
* You are organized and comfortable handling equipment, setup tasks, and asset tracking
* You communicate clearly and are comfortable interacting with colleagues in English
* You are eager to learn and gain hands\-on experience in a professional IT environment


**Above all**, we are looking for people who will make HelloFresh better. There are many different ways of developing skills, and we love diverse experiences! So even if you don't "*tick all the boxes*" but think you'd thrive in this role, we would really like to learn more about you.


**What we offer: The Toppings**


* **A strong starting package** including pension scheme (*Aegon Cappital, 50/50 split*), employee discounts (*20% HelloFresh, 40% Factor\_*), and access to the "*Benefits at Work*" discount page
* **Support for your wellbeing** with free access to *Headspace* and *OpenUp*, plus discounted gym memberships (*ClassPass* \& *Bedrijfsfitness Nederland*)
* **Time off to recharge** with 24 vacation days per calendar year to start, growing to 30 days per calendar year with your tenure
* **Plenty of learning opportunities** including a €700 annual development budget, AI learning programs, and access to internal and external training platforms
* **Travel made easy** with full public transport reimbursement or €0\.23/km for car or bike
* **A social and supportive environment** with team events, Friday drinks, and regular company moments to connect
* **Everything you need to get started** including a laptop and a well\-equipped office with lunch, snacks, and coffee


**Are you the missing ingredient?** If this sounds like a tasty opportunity, we'd be excited to hear from you. We aim to review your profile and respond within 5 business days.
