title: Data Analyst - Risk
description:
**This is Adyen**



Adyen provides payments, data, and financial products in a single solution for customers like Meta, Uber, H\&M, and Microsoft \- making us the financial technology platform of choice. At Adyen, everything we do is engineered for ambition.



For our teams, we create an environment with opportunities for our people to succeed, backed by the culture and support to ensure they are enabled to truly own their careers. We are motivated individuals who tackle unique technical challenges at scale and solve them as a team. Together, we deliver innovative and ethical solutions that help businesses achieve their ambitions faster.



Enterprise Risk is a function in Adyen's Second Line organization. The function manages a wide range of risk management topics ranging from Financial risk to Technology risk and from Strategic risk to Operational risk. The function has a key role in Adyen's risk management framework and has a strategic and advisory role by independently challenging, overseeing, and advising the rest of the company.


**Data Analyst \- Risk**



We're looking for a proactive, technical, and thorough Data Analyst to join our Enterprise Risk team in Amsterdam. As part of the Enterprise Risk team within Adyen's Second Line, you will work alongside risk experts and data analysts to reimagine risk management through technology, embedding new functionalities that drive automation, optimization, and data\-driven decision\-making. Our mission is to empower Second Line (risk) teams with innovative solutions and actionable insights while building the foundation for an automated risk management landscape.



While financial and risk acumen are a big plus, strong technical skills in data transformation, data governance, and automation are very important for this role. What sets you apart for this role are strong technical skills in data transformation, data analytics, and stakeholder management.


**What you'll do**


* Build and scale; design the foundation of Enterprise Risk's data capabilities and identify growth areas that multiply the effectiveness of the team.
* Develop, optimize and maintain our BI infrastructure on Looker using SQL and Python.
* Create scalable solutions to risk management that ensure data accuracy, consistency, and accessibility.
* Drive the automation of manual risk assessment processes by identifying opportunities for optimization and implementing technical solutions to improve efficiency.
* Partner closely with the different teams in Enterprise Risk to understand their needs, leverage their expertise and capacity, and simplify complexity through smart, user\-focused solutions.
* Liaise with other Data teams in the Second Line and leverage their expertise to apply to Enterprise Risk's scope.
* Champion data governance and data quality by ensuring data integrity, security, and access control through best practices.


**Who you are**


* An experienced data professional with a proven track record of 5\+ years in a (technical) data analyst, business intelligence, or similar role.
* Proficient in Python, SQL, PySpark, and BI tools (e.g. Looker). Experience with big data tools like Spark, Hadoop, Git, and Airflow is a strong advantage.
* You enjoy working in a high\-paced, technology\-driven environment where you may need to shift priorities.
* You work with intention, a strong sense of ownership, and a bias for action.
* You are comfortable talking straight and challenging the status quo, specifically with the ability to interact and collaborate with a variety of internal stakeholders from diverse disciplines and cultures.
* Self\-motivated,proactive, and result driven, always searching for scalable ways to streamline and add value to the business with attention to detail and high quality results.
* An excellent communicator and collaborator, with the ability to translate complex technical concepts into clear and actionable insights for both technical and non\-technical audiences.
* Experience working with risk management, financial data, and banking are a big plus


**Our Diversity, Equity and Inclusion commitments**



Our unique approach is a product of our diverse perspectives. This diversity of backgrounds and cultures is essential in helping us maintain our momentum. Our business and technical challenges are unique, and we need as many different voices as possible to join us in solving them \- voices like yours. No matter who you are or where you're from, we welcome you to be your true self at Adyen.



Studies show that women and members of underrepresented communities apply for jobs only if they meet 100% of the qualifications. Does this sound like you? If so, Adyen encourages you to reconsider and apply. We look forward to your application!


**What's next?**



Ensuring a smooth and enjoyable candidate experience is critical for us. We aim to get back to you regarding your application within 5 business days. Our interview process tends to take about 4 weeks to complete, but may fluctuate depending on the role. Learn more about our hiring process here. Don't be afraid to let us know if you need more flexibility.



This role is based out of our Amsterdam office. We are an office\-first company and value in\-person collaboration; we do not offer remote\-only roles.

title: App Analytics Analyst – eMobility (SaaS)
description:
Stop waiting for a domain to call your own, at Deftpower, it's yours from week one. Join Deftpowers App Team!



Full\-time



**About Deftpower**
-------------------



At Deftpower, we’re shaping the future of electric charging every single day. Our SaaS\-platform helps businesses across Europe make charging simpler, smarter and more sustainable. With AI and intelligent software, we make sure charging works seamlessly with the energy grid, creating a greener and more stable system for everyone.



We’re growing fast, thanks to a recent major investment, and there’s never a dull moment! We’re expanding, improving our technology. We hope our team of 85 grows to 125 by the end of this year!


### **About the team**



You join our App team, based in Arnhem. The team builds and improves the Deftpower app used by drivers across Europe every day. We work closely with Product, Engineering and our clients to create an experience that simply works, from the moment a driver opens the app to the moment they unplug.



Right now, we know a lot is happening in the app, but we can't always see exactly what. That changes with you. There's a foundation in place, but the real work is still ahead. You'll have the space, the support and the ownership to build something from the ground up that the whole organisation will rely on.  


**About the role**
------------------



You'll be the person the App team, our clients and our stakeholders have been waiting for! Questions about how drivers move through the app, where they drop off, what actually drives engagement, they come in constantly. Right now, nobody owns the answers. That changes with you.



There's a foundation in place, but most of the build is still ahead. You'll set up the analytics infrastructure from scratch: tagging plans, event tracking, behaviour dashboards, A/B tests. You'll translate raw behaviour data into insights that directly shape product decisions. You'll do that both internally and with our clients, who are actively asking for this kind of expertise.



This puts you at the centre of product, engineering and client relationships all at once. Your team lead has a data background themselves, so you'll have a real sparring partner from day one.


* Build and own app analytics infrastructure, including tagging plans and event tracking (e.g. GA4\);
* Develop behaviour dashboards covering user flows, funnels and session performance;
* Design and execute A/B tests together with Product Owners and Engineers;
* Analyse drop\-off patterns and translate friction into concrete product recommendations;
* Advise clients on what their user data means and how to act on it.
  


**For you**
-----------



You get a domain that's yours. No one looking over your shoulder telling you how to measure things, you build the standard. The questions you answer will directly influence what gets built and what gets dropped. Internally, you'll be the go\-to. Externally, clients are already asking for exactly what you'll deliver.



And you'll do it inside a company that moves fast, skips the politics and gives you room to grow. Your Team Lead and the wider data team are there to support you.



To strengthen our team spirit, we host quarterly Deftpower Days (D\-Day), where colleagues from Arnhem, Berlin and Sweden come together.


* Salary range between €55\.000 and €75\.000 a year, depending on experience.
* Holiday allowance and vacation days in line with Dutch regulations.
* Pension and long term benefits arranged according to Dutch standards.
* €2\.000 training budget per year.
* Choose your own laptop up to €1\.750\.
* Hybrid working, short decision lines and a high level of trust.
  


**About you**
-------------



You know how to turn data into a story that actually lands, with engineers, product managers and clients alike. Numbers are your starting point, not your endpoint. You bring people to insights they wouldn't have reached on their own, and you make it look effortless. That's why you are the hero we have been waiting for!


* You have hands\-on experience with app analytics: event tracking, tools like GA4, Mixpanel or Amplitude;
* You know how to set up and validate tracking together with engineering teams;
* You understand A/B testing and can advise on design, validity and interpretation;
* You're comfortable in a client\-facing role and can explain complex data in plain language;
* You recognise yourself in our values: Drive, Earnest, Forward thinking and Transparency.


**Our values**
--------------



**Drive**



You love turning ideas into action. You take ownership, push projects forward and get energy from creating solutions that actually work in the real world.

  


**Earnest**



You do the right thing, especially when no one’s watching. You’re respectful, honest and reliable, colleagues know they can count on you.

  


**Forward thinking**



You’re curious and not afraid to try new things. You experiment, learn fast and spot opportunities before others see them coming. Calculated risks? You’re in.

  


**Transparency**



You believe sharing is power. You communicate openly, give constructive feedback and make your work visible so the whole team can grow together.



**Apply for the job**
---------------------



This is what you can expect from our hiring process.



After you apply, the Team Lead will review your profile and reach out for a short introduction call if there's a match. From there: an interview, a short assessment that you'll present to the team were you also have the change to ask all the qustions you have. If both sides are enthusiastic, we move forward with an offer.



We keep the process clear, personal and focused on getting to know each other properly.

title: Netwerking Engineer (interim)
description:
We offer you an Ocean of Possibilities . Join our family.


**About us**  

Hop aboard Damen Naval; the naval division of the family\-owned Damen Shipyards Group, where 12,000 professionals work worldwide. Damen Naval delivers advanced naval vessels to clients all over the globe. By implementing the most innovative technological developments in practice, we continue to push the boundaries of the shipbuilding industry. You can be part of our team! Are you ready for duty?


**The role**

As the interim Network Engineer, you are responsible for designing, implementing, and maintaining secure and resilient network infrastructures that support our critical business operations. You ensure reliable connectivity across core and edge systems, enforce robust cybersecurity measures, and contribute to disaster recovery planning. Acting as a key link between internal teams and external partners, you align IT solutions with organizational needs while maintaining compliance with industry standards and DN policies. You play a central role in performance monitoring, capacity planning, and the continuous improvement of IT processes to support our evolving maritime and defense projects. Given the mission\-critical nature of our solutions, commitment to our 24/7 standby rotation is essential.


**Key accountabilities**  

In this interim role, your responsibilities will include:


* Core Connectivity: Deploy and maintain the organization’s core and edge connectivity, including LAN switching, enterprise Wi\-Fi, WAN links, and VPN solutions.
* Security Orchestration: Implement NAC platforms, firewall orchestration, and IP address management to protect systems from unauthorized access and cyber threats.
* Business Support: Provide technical support to key users by resolving networking and infrastructure issues, ensuring continuity through prompt incident response.
* Compliance \& Audits: Collaborate with architecture and security departments to ensure IT solutions meet industry regulations and support security audits/assessments.
* Performance \& Capacity: Analyze network performance, anticipate future capacity needs, and recommend upgrades or expansions to meet evolving demands.
* Disaster Recovery: Develop and implement disaster recovery plans to ensure the reliability and availability of the IT landscape for critical operations.
* Vendor Management: Advise on the procurement and deployment of hardware and software solutions in close collaboration with external vendors.
* Documentation \& Knowledge: Create comprehensive technical documentation and contribute to the development and retention of knowledge within the department.

**Skills \& experience**  

We are looking for candidates with the following qualifications:


* A Bachelor’s degree (HBO) in IT or a related field. Candidates with an MBO\-4 diploma and 3–5 years of relevant experience are also encouraged to apply.
* Mastery of the OSI model, TCP/IP suite, and routing protocols (OSPF, BGP). Proficiency in LAN switching (STP, LACP) and WLAN architectures is essential.
* Hands\-on experience with 802\.1X NAC solutions and in\-depth knowledge of VPN technologies (IPsec, SSL/TLS), preferably involving military\-grade encryption.
* Experience with WAN/SD\-WAN platforms and familiarity with IPAM tools and network monitoring analytics.
* Cisco CCNA is required (CCNP preferred). Equivalent certifications from vendors such as Juniper, Fortinet, Aruba, or Palo Alto are highly valued. ITIL Foundation is a plus.
* Basic scripting and automation abilities (Python, Ansible, or REST APIs) to drive efficiency.
* Industry Context: Previous experience in IT operations or security within a maritime and/or defense\-related environment is an advantage.
* Communication: A good command of both the English and Dutch language, both written and verbal.
* Available to participate in our 24/7 standby rotation schedule.
* Excellent references, as a security screening is part of the hiring process.
* Permanent EU citizenship and passport are both required. Candidates with EU (work) visa or with both an EU and non\-EU nationality and/or passport are not eligible in accordance with the requirements imposed by the military nature of our projects.

**What we offer**  

At Damen Naval, we value our temporary team members and strive for a positive and successful collaboration. As a temporary professional on secondment basis, we offer you the following conditions:


* An attractive salary aligned with permanent staff.
* Travel allowance of 23 cents per kilometre.
* Flexibility to work from home up to two days a week.
* Challenging and innovative projects.

**Application \& information**  

This temporary assignment is exclusively offered on a secondment (detachering) or temporary employment contract basis. Freelance or ZZP agreements are not considered due to current Dutch legislation.
  

  

If you are interested, please submit your application with the following details:


* Your CV and motivational letter.
* Indication of your expected gross monthly salary (based on full\-time work).
* Your availability (full\-time/part\-time and number of hours).
* Your notice period and preferred start date.

  

For more information about the vacancy or Damen Naval, please visit the Damen Naval website , the Damen Naval Career website or contact the Corporate Recruitment department via \+31 118 485 000\.
  

  

*A pre\-assignment and security screening and investigation form part of the recruitment process.*

title: Data Engineer
description:
Are you looking for a role where you can shape the data infrastructure of an organization? Are you a dynamic professional passionate about leveraging data to drive meaningful impact? Read on!

 **Navigating the Future**

  

Working at Anthony Veder means operating at the heart of the transition to a more sustainable world. We are always looking for new ways to challenge the status quo, developing new technological and logistical solutions to help our clients reach their goals.

  

We work in a culture of trust, openness, and creativity. Always keeping an eye on the long term. This is how we became pioneers in the maritime industry. To meet the vision to be an ambitious leader in gas shipping service solutions, Anthony Veder has identified the need for data\-driven innovations and –decisions within the organization. This means that using data and data analysis should become a core part of our overall strategy, culture and business processes. The Data \& Analytics team was founded to drive the transition to a data\-driven organization.


The Data \& Analytics team is dedicated to setting up a central data infrastructure, where data from all different sources within Anthony Veder will be integrated into a single source of truth. Furthermore, the team will provide business value by enabling near real\-time monitoring and signaling of data, providing insights to manage our fleet proactively, and leading the transition to a data\-driven company culture.

  

Your objective for the position of the Data Engineer is to:

* Develop, manage and monitor data pipelines to ingest and process data to our data platform (Data Lakehouse on Azure)
* Own the technology of the data platform and manage the work and delivery pace to extend and improve this platform.
* Understand business needs to identify challenges and risks better and make informed decisions on the infrastructure design.
* Analyse and organize raw data, ensuring data is reliable and trustworthy for consumption.
* Collaborate with the team to continuously improve the way we work and process work to maximize our value to the organization.
* Drive thinking regarding new technologies and applications in the team and the organization.

 **Additionally, what you can expect is:**

* A culture that expects and supports entrepreneurship.
* A position that offers a lot of autonomy and expects a high level of ownership for that autonomy.
* The opportunity to have a direct impact on the way the organization uses data.

 **What we offer**

* A dynamic organization with an entrepreneurial character
* A competitive salary
* An employer\-financed pension scheme
* 28 vacation days (full\-time)
* Combining working from home and at our beautiful office in Rotterdam's shipping district
* An informal and open culture
* A degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field (higher professional education (HBO) or scientific/research education (WO, Bachelor or Master))
* 5\+ years of experience in a similar role
* Working experience with building data lakehouse in Azure (Synapse, DevOps)
* Ability to use Python, Git, Terraform (IaC), SQL
* Excellent verbal and written command of English
* Ability to organize, refine and manage your work
* Analytical thinking
* Proactivity

title: Digital Data Specialist
description:
Do you want to play a key role in analyzing and optimizing the performance of leading housing platforms like Pararius and Huurwoningen.nl and our international platforms? Are you technically skilled, an expert in platforms such as Tealium or tools like Google Tag Manager, and do you enjoy working in a multidisciplinary data team? Then we're looking for you!

**Your Role**

As a Digital Data Specialist, you'll be part of our Analytics team, consisting of two Data Analysts, and a Data Engineer. You'll be fully responsible for the setup and expansion of Tealium (iQ \& EventStream/AudienceStream). You are the 'owner' of this platform: from vision to execution. While you report to the Analytics Team Lead, you'll have the freedom and responsibility to shape and manage the technical roadmap.

You are an indispensable link in the organization and a strong discussion partner for the Platforms product team and the CRO team. You manage the interests of various stakeholders and translate their ambitions into the right tracking and data infrastructure.

**What will you do?**

* **Tealium Ownership:** You take the lead in the entire Tealium environment, our Customer Data Platform. You are responsible for the architecture, data quality, and further integration of AudienceStream (CDP).
* **Stakeholder Management:** You work closely with the Analytics, Website and CRO teams. You advise them on technical feasibility and ensure that tagging needs are seamlessly incorporated into the development process.
* **CDP Innovation:** You are the driving force behind connecting and activating customer data, enabling us to offer our users a personalized experience.
* **Lead in Tagging \& Events:** You design and implement complex tagging structures (Client\- and Server\-Side) and draw up measurement plans for new platform features.
* **Collaboration:** You align the technical vision with the Analytics Team Lead and work side by side with the Data Engineer and Data Analysts to turn tracking into insight.

**What do you bring?**

* Demonstrable experience with Customer Data Platforms (i.e. Tealium, Adobe, Segment, etc) is a requirement.
* You are a strong communicator and able to take the lead in conversations with stakeholders (Product, Marketing, Tech).
* You have a strong sense of responsibility and are accustomed to showing ownership over your own tech stack.
* In\-depth knowledge of Google Analytics 4 and a clear vision on the transition to Server\-Side tracking.
* Strong understanding of CDP architecture and how to leverage data for personalization and retention.
* Good command of JavaScript, HTML, and API integrations.
* Experience with technically facilitating A/B testing programs and CRO workflows.

**We expect a lot from you!**

But in return, you can expect the following from us:

* A laptop to work with.
* Enthusiastic, motivated, and fun colleagues to work with, in an inspiring office with a stunning view of Blaak, Rotterdam.
* We're not a corporate company — our organization is characterized by an informal culture and short lines of communication.
* We have lunch together, enjoy fun outings, do bootcamps, and like to have a beer or two on Friday afternoons.
* We offer discounts on sports memberships through Urban Sports Club and organize a bootcamp every Tuesday afternoon.
* We offer a pension plan where we cover 70% of the costs.
* We offer a market\-competitive salary with growth opportunities and provide a budget for training.

Does this sound like your next challenge? Apply directly!

description:
**This is what we offer you**
-----------------------------

* **Salary:** Gross monthly salary between EUR 4,931 and EUR 7,043 (scale 09\) for a 36\-hour work week.
* **Extras:** a thirteenth month, 8% holiday allowance, and a 10% Employee Benefit Budget.

Or view all our benefits.


You shape and deliver the foundations of a self\-service Insights Platform used by thousands of colleagues across Financial Economic Crime, enabling faster, more reliable insights at scale.

**You \& your role**
--------------------


Build and lead a new engineering capability by designing and delivering a scalable Insights Platform that enables trusted data products and reusable metrics across Financial Economic Crime. As Lead Data Engineer Insights Platform, you work in a greenfield environment where you define standards, architecture, and ways of working while enabling teams to deliver production\-grade insights.

**Examples from practice**
--------------------------

* Designing and implementing robust data pipelines and contracts for reusable insights across multiple domains.
* Setting up platform infrastructure with governance, reliability, and quality controls embedded from day one.
* Leading a new engineering team and coaching engineers to deliver secure, production\-ready data solutions.

**Facts \& figures**
--------------------

* 36–40 hours per week.
* You serve 8,000 colleagues with Financial Economic Crime data products.
* Over 48,000 Rabobank colleagues worldwide.

**Top 3 responsibilities**
--------------------------

* Drive engineering leadership by setting technical direction, ensuring high\-quality delivery, and balancing speed with production\-grade standards across the platform.
* Collaborate closely with product teams and architects to translate user needs into scalable, future\-proof platform solutions.
* Enable teams by mentoring engineers, improving technical maturity, and fostering a culture of reliability, ownership, and continuous improvement.


You lead the technical evolution of the Insights Platform, focusing on scalability, governance, and reusability. You ensure teams can independently create, share, and consume trusted insights while preparing the platform for advanced analytics and artificial intelligence capabilities.

**Together we achieve more than alone**
---------------------------------------


We believe in the power of differences. By combining people’s differences, we become an even better bank. We are curious about what you bring to our team.


“You will join at the start of a new platform journey and help build a trusted, scalable marketplace for insights that supports decision making at the highest levels of the bank.”


We are responsible for delivering reliable, reusable insights across Financial Economic Crime. Collaboration is our way of working; as one data\-minded team within Rabobank. You work closely with other lead data engineers and tech leads in a strong engineering community where knowledge sharing and continuous improvement are central.

**Work on yourself \& the world around you**
--------------------------------------------


For us, your development and that of society go hand in hand. That is why we invest in you and work together to create a better world. We summarize this in one sentence: “At Rabobank, you work on yourself and the world around you simultaneously.”  

This is reflected in your personal development budget, our hybrid work environment, and a healthy work\-life balance. You work on banking solutions for our clients and contribute to social challenges such as the food and energy transitions.

**Why everyone is welcome at Rabobank**
---------------------------------------


At Rabobank, we work toward a culture where everyone feels welcome. We value differences and use them to collaborate more effectively and make better decisions. By being open to different perspectives, we create an environment where colleagues feel heard and enjoy working, enabling us to better serve our customers.

**You \& your talent**
----------------------

* Bachelor's or master's degree in e.g. computer sciences.
* 7\+ years’ experience as a Data Engineer in a complex IT landscape.
* 3\+ years’ experience in a leading position in a similar environment.
* Experience in or affinity with software development in the financial sector, the payment sector in particular is preferable.
* Great analytical and problem\-solving skills.
* Agile mindset and experience in working agile/scrum teams.
* Experienced in working with, SQL and developing ETL solutions.
* Experienced in working with Azure data platform. For example ADF, Databricks, Synapse, Azure DevOps.
* Experienced in testing pipelines which are built on Azure with system and regression tests.
* Experienced with OPS work like monitoring and solving incidents.
* Knowledge of Apache Airflow.
* Knowledge of data modelling and data management is preferable.
* Knowledge of Python Spark is preferable.
* Knowledge of client and payments data is preferable.

**You \& the application process**
----------------------------------

* If you are invited for an interview, Bo, our virtual assistant, will contact you via SMS and email to schedule the interviews.
* You can find answers to frequently asked questions at Rabobank.jobs/en/faq/.
* + Assessments and a reliability screening are part of the procedure.
* We respect your privacy.

title: Machine learning Engineer
description:
Sia is a next\-generation, global management consulting group. Founded in 1999, we were born digital. Today our strategy and management capabilities are augmented by data science, enhanced by creativity and driven by responsibility. We’re optimists for change and we help clients initiate, navigate and benefit from transformation. We believe optimism is a force multiplier, helping clients to mitigate downside and maximize opportunity. With expertise across a broad range of sectors and services, our 3,000 consultants serve clients worldwide from 48 locations in 19 countries. Our expertise delivers results. Our optimism transforms outcomes.
   

  

**Job Description**
**What you will do**
 As an expert in the field of Machine Learning Engineering you will be responsible for the growth of our Data team, both professionally as well as in size. You will be in charge of shaping and executing the future of your expertise within Sia. You will work on client projects as well as on building our own Sia AI solutions, together with our Dutch team of Data Scientists, our French Data Engineering team, and other business units of Sia Global.
   

  

 Your responsibilities include:
   

  

* Leading an internal team towards the development of AI products;
* Working in a multidisciplinary team on client projects as an expert on your subject;
* Making architectural and design decisions for cloud environments;
* Building production level ML/AI solutions with solid software engineering;
* Guiding Data Scientists to scale up their models into production (parallelizing, optimizing, tuning, testing, and wrapping);
* Giving trainings, leading internal meetings and organizing external events;
* Participating in team meetings and workshops with clients;
* Writing blog articles, presenting at conferences and sending out press releases on the subject that you lead.


**Who You Will Work With**
 The Data Science team is young, diverse and growing (10\+). You will join a team that will challenge you and invest in your professional development. We have a flat structure and rely on the entrepreneurial spirit of our members: initiative is highly encouraged. We are striving for well\-being, diversity and knowledge\-sharing inside the team, so that we can grow together.
   

  

**Who You Are**
* You are an established technical professional that wants to make the next step in their career, taking on more leadership responsibilities.
* You have first\-rate project management and time management skills.
* You are a true problem solver, you turn complex issues into simple and impactful business solutions.
* You are enthusiastic for applying Data Science/Engineering solutions to business problems.
* You have excellent communication skills and can present complicated concepts in a synthetic way.
* You have the ability to adapt rapidly and work on a range of different business areas within a challenging environment.
* You have the ability to work collaboratively in a team environment.


**In return, you can expect:**
* An international company that gives importance to diversity, inclusion, employee well\-being and corporate social responsibilities actions.
* A great working atmosphere with friendly and professional colleagues where innovation and entrepreneurship are encouraged
* A personal development plan with a regular follow\-up as well training opportunities to develop yourself
* A competitive salary with great advantages, like mobility budget, hospital insurance, performance \-related bonus,...


**Qualifications**
* MSc level education in Computer Science, Applied Mathematics, Artificial Intelligence, Embedded Systems or related field of study.
* 2\-4 years of experience in building production\-quality ML/Deep Learning pipelines and models.
* Good understanding of Machine Learning fundamentals and strong knowledge in a specific domain (e.g., Computer Vision, Deep Learning, NLP).
* Expert coding skills in Python and at least one of these languages: Scala, C\+\+, Java.
* Hands\-on experience with database management languages (e.g., SQL, PostgreSQL).
* Hands\-on experience in cloud\-based infrastructures (AWS/GCP/Azure).
* Hands\-on experience with Unix\-based command line and DevOps tools (Git, Docker, Kubernetes).
* Hands\-on experience with big data technologies (e.g. Spark, Hadoop, Databricks).
* You have a strong interest in data and AI\-related topics, the ability to quickly build expertise in these areas, and you’re excited about helping our clients seize the opportunities they offer.
* Experience with coaching/mentoring other engineers.
* Prior experience in Management Consulting is a strong plus.
* Willingness to travel and work at local and international clients.
* Fluency in spoken and written English and Dutch is required.


**Additional Information**
 We are unable to provide a work permit for this position
   

  

 Sia is an equal opportunity employer. All aspects of employment, including hiring, promotion, remuneration, or discipline, are based solely on performance, competence, conduct, or business needs.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description:
**Company** 




 A leading global biotechnology organization dedicated to discovering, developing, and delivering innovative medicines for patients with serious illnesses. Driven by science and powered by advanced technology, the organization focuses on areas such as oncology, cardiovascular disease, inflammation, and rare diseases. Its mission is centered on improving lives by turning cutting\-edge science into meaningful therapies that address unmet medical needs.
 







**Job Description** 




 We are seeking an experienced Industrial Machine Learning Engineer to support initiatives in smart digital manufacturing. The role involves developing and deploying machine learning models to improve equipment reliability and operational efficiency, primarily through analyzing sensor and system data from industrial machinery.
 







**Responsibilities** 



* Manage the full lifecycle of machine learning models, from data collection and preprocessing to development, validation, deployment, and ongoing refinement.
* Analyze data from equipment such as compressors, pumps, and manufacturing systems to identify patterns and generate actionable insights.
* Interpret physical system behaviors using various sensor data, including vibration, temperature, force, position, and images.
* Research and recommend suitable machine learning and deep learning models for predictive maintenance, anomaly detection, and condition monitoring.
* Build, train, and validate models with a focus on real\-time deployment in manufacturing environments using Python workflows.
* Create dashboards in Grafana for monitoring data streams and model outputs.
* Regularly evaluate model performance, monitor for drift, and ensure robustness over time.
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams, including automation engineers and external vendors, to ensure solutions meet operational needs and are effectively integrated.







**Requirements** 



* MSc in Computer Science, Machine Learning, Mechatronics, or related engineering field with a minimum of 3 years’ relevant experience, or BSc with at least 5 years’ relevant experience.
* Strong proficiency in Python (including pandas, scikit\-learn, PyTorch or TensorFlow) and experience with platforms like Databricks.
* Solid knowledge of anomaly detection, probabilistic models, and deploying machine learning solutions in industrial settings.
* Ability to interpret sensor data from machinery such as pumps, compressors, and assembly systems.
* Hands\-on experience with software engineering and DevOps practices, including version control (Git), containerization (Docker), and CI/CD workflows.
* Proven ability to independently design and implement end\-to\-end machine learning solutions.
* Fluent in English, both written and spoken.







**Other Information** 




 Apply to our vacancy for more information. Looking forward to getting in touch!

title: AI Developer
description:
**Who we are**
 We’re GoSpooky: the ones who get all things social. A global agency made for the social era. We grow brands through content, community and commerce, keeping them at the forefront of culture. Social isn’t just first, it’s the foundation.
   

  

 From creatives and commerce specialists to game designers and data analysts, we cover the full social spectrum. If it shapes internet culture, we’re on it, making fast, bold and relevant work that actually gets shared.
   

  

 From TikToks that breaks the for you page, to creator stories built with real community insights, all the way to TikTok Shop, social affiliates and live social shopping that convert in real time.
   

  

 As official partners of Instagram and Snapchat and partners and social affiliates of TikTok (Shop), we work with brands like KLM, JBL, Samsung, Prime Video and HEMA. Driven by bold ambition, endless creativity and authentic people, our teams think ahead, react fast and keep brands culturally relevant. Whether it’s live social shopping, creator management, social\-first campaigns or turning a trend into a brand moment.
   

  

 We’re always looking for fresh energy: people who bring new perspectives, challenge the norm and help us and our clients evolve. If you love shaking up social, thinking big and moving fast, you’ll fit right in.
   

  

**The Role**
 As our Senior E2E AI Engineer, you are first and foremost experienced with dev work in production. You are not just prototyping in notebooks; you are architecting the end\-to\-end infrastructure, devops, and any necessary cloud or data engineering tasks that powers our next\-generation AI tools.
   

  

 Your mission is to build the "pipes and plumbing" that make AI agents reliable, observable, and secure. You will own the full stack: from Data Engineering on BigQuery, to API development with FastAPI, to Model Serving on Vertex AI, and finally to DevOps/CI/CD pipelines that keep it all running. You sit at the intersection of Data/Software Engineering and AIOps.
   

  

 You will report to our AI Lead and work closely with the Data and Insights team and leaders across different business units.
   

  

 This role is part\-time (24 \- 32 hours per week)
   

  

 What you’ll do
   

  

* Develop and deploy complex AI workflows (advanced RAG, multi\-agent systems) integrated with core productivity tools
* Build robust APIs and backends for RAG Pipelines and AI agents
* Design and maintain scalable data pipelines for ETL, ingestion, and data preparation to ground models in high\-quality data
* Manage the testing deployment lifecycle, automating and versioning updates. Orchestrate models on Vertex AI (fine\-tuning, serving, monitoring)
* Implement AIOps and Agent Observability (tracing, logging, monitoring), while enforcing security for model inputs, outputs, and infrastructure


 What we’re looking for
   

  

* 6\+ years of professional software/data engineering experience, including at least 2 years of production\-level hands\-on experience in AI development/engineering
* Proven experience with advanced RAG use cases, at least one major GenAI framework (e.g., LangChain, LlamaIndex, or Heystack) plus one multi\-agent framework (e.g., Langgraph, Google ADK, Vertex AI Agent Builder, or Microsoft Agent Framework)
* Expert\-level Python (or Typescript) skills. You write clean, modular, production\-ready code. You are proficient with Pydantic (or an equivalent in Typescript) for validation and FastAPI for high\-performance Async I/O
* Essential expertise in Google Cloud, BigQuery (complex SQL, data warehousing) and Vertex AI (deployment, serving). Strong capability in building ETL/ELT pipelines
* You are comfortable with Git, Docker, and Kubernetes. You are experienced in devops and know how to set up CI/CD pipelines to automate all the necessary testing and deployment. Practical knowledge of securing applications (API security, secrets management, IAM, input sanitization)
* Familiarity with MCP and A2A protocols. Hands\-on experience with some LLMOps and AI evaluation framework (e.g. GenAI Evals on Vertex, DSPy, RAGAs) as well as high quality vector databases (e.g. Weaviate, Milvus, Qdrant, or Neo4j)


**Nice to have**
* Experience in creative studios or digital production
* Understanding of GDPR, data governance, and AI ethics
* Experience working with fine tuning SLMs and specialized vertical AI agents, n8n, and video generation models
* Experience with machine learning and neural networks


 What’s in it for you?
   

  

* Flexible holiday policy for a proper recharge
* Commuting allowance
* Remote working possibilities in agreement with your team
* A MacBook for peak productivity
* Training opportunities to develop your skills and grow with us
* Healthy communal lunches to keep you fueled
* Fun events to connect, recharge, and bond as a team
* Phone allowance of up to €25/month (depending on your role)
* Unlimited mental health support via OpenUp
* A pension plan where you contribute a percentage of your salary
* Gift card and birthday wishes every year
* Dutch classes for international team members


**Apply for the job**
 So, do you want to join our team? We’d love to hear from you! Please note: a valid EU work permit is required for this role.
   

  

 GoSpooky is an equal\-opportunity employer. Our hiring decisions are based on objective measures and we will not discriminate against any aspect of your identity. We believe that a diverse team is crucial to our collective success and value an inclusive culture where everyone can make their impact and bring their true unique selves to work.

title: AI Automation Engineer
description:
The AFS Interest Rates Division has roots dating back 170 years and continues to expand in both its core established and new markets. In total AFS Group counts more than 175 employees, with ambitious growth plans centered on how to best serve our customers in this dynamic, ever\-changing, and fast\-paced markets. The AFS Interest Rates Division consists of a group of 40\+ ambitious and motivated professionals across Money \& Capital Markets and Fixed Income providing best in class solutions to serve a variety of public sector, corporate, banking, and institutional clients.
 



  





 At AFS Group, our values drive how we work and grow together. We are committed to being knowledgeable in our field, collaborative in our approach, entrepreneurial in our mindset, accurate in our execution, and ethical in all our dealings.
 



  





 We are seeking talented Brokers to help grow and deepen relationships with corporates, governments, and public institutions across the Asia. You’ll be supported by AFS’ robust product suite, as well as the expertise and network of our experienced colleagues. The Interest Asia desk specializes in brokering deposits, commercial paper (CP), certificates of deposit (CD), and other short\-term interest rate instruments. We also facilitate loans, medium\-term notes (MTNs), and private placements in the capital markets on behalf of our core clients. More broadly, the Interest Rates Division is active across the following product areas:
 



  




* Interbank and Non\-banking Deposits
* Certificates of Deposits (CD) \& Commercial Paper (CP)
* Repurchase Agreements
* Arbitrage
* Foreign Exchange (mainly FX\-Swaps)
* Interest Rate Derivatives
* Treasury Bills
* Medium Term Notes \& Structured Bonds
* Private Placements \& Structured Loans

title: Senior AI Engineer
description:
**Job Description** 




**Job title:** 
 Senior AI Engineer / Senior Software Engineer
 



**Location:** 
 Amsterdam
 



**Work:** 
 full\-time / hybrid
 



  





**About the company** 




 We are an Amsterdam\-based AI company building purpose\-designed assistants for healthcare professionals. Our technology integrates directly into existing clinical systems to help users find information quickly, generate summaries, consult trusted medical knowledge, and reduce administrative workload. Our platform is developed specifically for regulated healthcare environments, with a strong focus on clinical reliability, privacy, and European compliance. The product is already deployed with early customers, and larger roll\-outs are planned.The company is in a high\-growth phase with a small, experienced team, strong recent traction, and a clear roadmap for expansion. We operate with a low\-bureaucracy, high\-ownership culture where teams work in fast iterations and individuals can make meaningful impact from day one.
 



  





  





**The Role** 




 We are hiring an AI\-focused Software Engineer to join our core product team and build production\-grade generative AI capabilities on our platform. You will work in a small, high\-velocity squad alongside experienced engineers and a solution architect to develop agent\-based workflows and orchestration systems on top of clinical data. This role has immediate impact: the platform and customers already exist, and you will help turn that foundation into scalable features that improve real workflows for healthcare professionals. You will own projects end\-to\-end, collaborate closely with the team in short sprints, and iterate quickly based on user feedback. Success in this role requires curiosity, pragmatism, and the ability to build robust systems in a fast\-moving AI landscape.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Design and build generative AI features, including agent\-based systems and orchestration pipelines
* Develop scalable backend components that integrate models, data sources, and platform services
* Translate product requirements into working solutions with strong technical foundations
* Take ownership of features from design through deployment and iteration
* Collaborate closely with engineers, solution architects, and leadership in weekly sprints
* Improve system robustness, performance, and reliability over time
* Contribute to continuous product improvement based on real user feedback
* Support integrations and platform evolution as new client needs emerge



  





  





**Requirements** 



* You have experience in software engineering, preferably building backend or platform systems in production environments
* You have hands\-on experience with generative AI, LLM\-based systems, or agent frameworks (e.g., RAG, orchestration, prompt pipelines)
* You are comfortable working across technologies and are not tied to a single language or framework
* You have experience building reliable, maintainable systems rather than experimental prototypes only
* You demonstrate curiosity, strong problem\-solving skills, and a pragmatic approach to engineering
* You have good working knowledge of Python (or similar backend languages)
* You have excellent written and verbal communication skills in English
* Preferably, you have experience working in fast\-paced startup or high\-ownership environments



  





**We Care** 



* **Competitive compensation:** 
 Base salary approximately €90k–€100k, with equity participation (approx. 0\.6%–0\.8%) depending on experience
* **Vacation:** 
 25 days of paid holiday per year
* **Hybrid work:** 
 Flexible arrangement
* **Impactful work:** 
 Opportunity to contribute to a fast\-growing, well\-funded company with real customers and strong market traction
* **Career growth:** 
 High\-ownership environment with opportunities to grow into technical leadership roles as the company scales
* **Team culture:** 
 Low\-politics, high\-trust environment focused on collaboration, responsibility, and rapid progress

title: Data Analytics Consultant
description:
Sia is a next\-generation, global management consulting group. Founded in 1999, we were born digital. Today our strategy and management capabilities are augmented by data science, enhanced by creativity and driven by responsibility. We’re optimists for change and we help clients initiate, navigate and benefit from transformation. We believe optimism is a force multiplier, helping clients to mitigate downside and maximize opportunity.
   

  

 With expertise across a broad range of sectors and services, our 3,000 consultants serve clients worldwide from 48 locations in 19 countries. Our expertise delivers results. Our optimism transforms outcomes.
   

  

**Job Description**
 As a Data Analytics Consultant, you will be at the heart of delivering impactful data\-driven strategies to our clients. You will collaborate closely with local and international clients to bridge the gap between business objectives and technical execution.
   

  

 You will help deliver actionable data\-driven solutions \& insights, and present the results in an interactive, easily understandable manner.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
* Collaborate with stakeholders to define business goals and shape solution blueprints through workshops and mock\-ups.
* Prepare and validate data by mapping, extracting, cleaning, enriching, and performing feature engineering to establish stable datasets for analysis.
* Design, implement, and automate interactive dashboards and customized reports that cater to specific client requirements using advanced visualization tools.
* Conduct comprehensive statistical analysis and exploratory data investigations to extract actionable insights supporting decision\-making.
* Translate complex technical and analytical findings into clear, understandable presentations for non\-technical stakeholders.
* Stay up to date with industry trends, emerging technologies, and best practices in data analytics, applying innovative approaches to enhance service offerings.
* Provide guidance and support to business users and team members in leveraging data effectively, contributing to a data\-driven culture and continuous learning.


**Within Sia, you will**
* Contribute to enhancing Sia’s Data Science and Generative AI offerings through internal training sessions, working groups, and publications.
* Represent Sia at professional events, actively contributing to thought leadership (articles, white papers, webinars).
* Support business development by crafting proposals/offers, identifying collaboration opportunities, and nurturing long\-term client relationships.


**Qualifications**
**About You**
 You bring:
   

  

* A Master's degree in Business, Statistics, Data Science, Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field.
* 0–3 years of experience in data analytics or a relevant consulting or industry role.
* Fluency in Dutch or French, and English. If you speak German, that's a plus.
* Strategic thinking with strong analytical skills and a proactive approach.
* Experience in clearly communicating and presenting complex ideas to varied audiences.
* Efficient collaboration with various stakeholders, internally and externally, to gather requirements and support data\-driven decisions.
* Eagerness to work alongside and learn from more experienced colleagues while contributing fresh ideas to team projects.
* Interest in applying innovative analytics and AI solutions to drive sustainability and create meaningful business impact.


 Your technical toolkit:
   

  

* Hands\-on experience with Python or R for data analysis.
* Proficiency with SQL and Microsoft Excel for data manipulation.
* Familiarity with dashboarding tools like Power BI, Tableau, or Looker.
* Knowledge of cloud environments (AWS, Azure, GCP) is a strong plus.


**What You Can Expect From Us**
 Your development is our priority. Whether it’s through challenging projects, inspiring colleagues or personal growth, we invest in your success, every step of the way.
   

  

 We offer:
   

  

* An attractive salary that grows with your experience and performance.
* A yearly bonus based on your individual and team results.
* Sustainable and practical mobility options, whether you prefer to travel by train, bike, or your own vehicle.
* A solid pension plan and additional benefits to support your well\-being.
* Freedom in where you work, from home, at the client’s office, or in one of our inspiring hubs in Amsterdam or Maastricht, including a home working allowance to make remote work comfortable.
* 26 days of holiday per year, with the opportunity to earn extra days as your seniority grows.
* Plenty of learning opportunities, from mentoring and training programs to international projects that broaden your perspective.
* A strong community, where connection matters – we organize regular social and sports activities to celebrate successes together.


 Do you have the drive and enthusiasm to help build our great company, and does this position sound like a perfect fit for you? We'd love to get to know you!
   

  

**Additional Information**
 Unfortunately, we are unable to provide a work permit for this position.

title: Application Scientist (Mesoscale / Coarse Grained Force Fields)
description:
**About CuspAI**
 CuspAI is the frontier AI company on a mission to solve the breakthrough materials needed to power human progress. While nature took billions of years to perfect molecules, we are harnessing AI to unlock trillion\-dollar materials breakthroughs in months, not millennia. Our founding team is the most cited in the world, comprised of world\-class researchers in AI, chemistry and engineering.
   

  

 We are working on some of the hardest and most important challenges including energy, clean water, the future of compute, and carbon capture, and this is just the start of what our 'search engine' for next\-generation materials will unlock.
   

  

 We invite you to be part of a diverse, innovative team at the intersection of AI and materials science, working to create impactful partnerships that drive innovation, scalability, and industry collaboration. This work matters. Your work matters.
   

  

**We’re on the cusp of the on\-demand materials era. Join us.**
 The Role
   

  

 Due to expansion into a new area, we are seeking an
 **Application Scientist (Mesoscale / Coarse\-Grained Force Fields)** 
 to bridge the gap between our frontier AI models and real\-world industrial materials challenges.
   

  

 Your Impact
   

  

 In this role you will be
 **building the mesoscale simulation frameworks and coarse\-grained force field methodologies that bridge molecular discovery with macroscopic material performance** 
 , which is critical for delivering actionable, high\-impact breakthroughs for our global partners.
   

  

 Your main focus initially will be leading the technical delivery for 1\-2 key client projects, acting as the subject matter expert in mesoscale phenomena. Over time, you will play a foundational role in scaling our ML platform’s capabilities from the atomic level to the larger\-scale structures required for next\-generation polymers, membranes, and complex fluids.
   

  

 What You Will Do
   

  

**Method Development \& Research**
* Design and implement novel coarse\-graining strategies to enable the simulation of large\-scale material systems.
* Develop and refine mesoscale force fields, specifically working with Martini 3 and related frameworks.
* Collaborate with our AI Research team to integrate machine learning (ML) models into mesoscale simulation workflows.


**Partner Project Execution**
* Work closely with our early partners to understand their specific materials challenges and translate them into technical simulation requirements.
* Execute high\-fidelity Molecular Dynamics (MD) and mesoscale simulations to validate AI\-driven material candidates.
* Deliver technical reports and insights that demonstrate the value of CuspAI’s technology in solving partner\-specific problems.


**Interdisciplinary Collaboration**
* Partner with the Particle Simulation ML team to explore overlaps between generative AI and particle\-based modeling.
* Act as the internal authority on mesoscale methods, providing guidance to AI researchers on physical constraints and realistic material behaviors.
* Participate in cross\-functional sprints to build out CuspAI's core infrastructure for multi\-scale materials discovery.


 Must Have Skills and Qualifications:
   

  

* Deep expertise in parameterizing mesoscale coarse\-grain force fields and working extensively with mesoscale methods (e.g. Martini 3\).
* Solid software engineering foundations with strong proficiency in Python and experience with MD simulation packages (e.g. GROMACS, LAMMPS).
* A demonstrated background in both Machine Learning (ML) and Molecular Dynamics (MD), with the ability to navigate both disciplines comfortably.
* Strong communication skills and the ability to work directly with external partners to define and deliver complex technical projects.
* You are someone who gets excited about the opportunity to enable scientists to work on world\-changing challenges in this domain, with a personal interest in the potential applications of the technology that Cusp is building.


 Bonus Points (But Not Critical):
   

  

* An academic background (PhD or equivalent) in Materials Science, Physics, Chemistry, or Chemical Engineering focused on multi\-scale modeling.
* Experience in "ML for Physics" (e.g. Neural Network Force Fields or learned coarse\-graining).
* Previous experience in an early\-stage startup or a client\-facing technical role.
* Familiarity with high\-performance computing (HPC) environments and cloud\-based simulation scaling.


 Additional Considerations
   

  

 This role could be based in our Cambridge, London, Amsterdam or Berlin offices, with the expectation of being in the office three days per week. Additionally, there may be regular travel required to other locations for collaboration and project work.
   

  

 What we offer
   

  

* A competitive salary plus equity package so you have a stake in the success of the company
* 28 days holiday
* Professional development budget for scientific conferences and technical training
* Opportunity to work at the forefront of AI\-driven scientific discovery with world\-class researchers
* Direct impact on advancing materials science through cutting\-edge technology
* Collaborative environment bridging AI research, computational chemistry, and experimental science


**Join us in shaping the future of materials with AI. Together, we can create groundbreaking solutions for a more sustainable world.**
**CuspAI is an equal opportunities employer committed to building a diverse and inclusive workplace** 
 . We do not discriminate on the basis of sex, race, religion or belief, ethnic or national origin, disability, age, citizenship, marital, domestic or civil partnership status, sexual orientation, gender identity, pregnancy or related condition (including breastfeeding), veteran status, or any other basis protected by applicable law.
   

  

**We actively encourage applications from all backgrounds and value the unique perspectives and contributions that diversity brings to our team.**
**Please let us know If you require any specific adjustments during or after the interview process. We will do everything we can within reason to accommodate.**

description:
Sia is a next\-generation, global management consulting group born digital, augmented by data, enhanced by creativity, and driven by responsibility. We partner with clients to resolve challenges and capitalize on opportunities. We believe that in today’s world of change and disruption, optimism is a force multiplier.
   

  

  

  




**Job Description**

 The Amsterdam Data Science team is diverse, dynamic, and rapidly growing. You will collaborate closely within multidisciplinary teams, applying advanced analytics and machine learning techniques to solve complex business problems and deliver impactful solutions. Our flat structure encourages initiative, entrepreneurial spirit, diversity, well\-being, and knowledge sharing so that we grow together.
   

  





**Responsibilities**




 As a Data Science Consultant, you will collaborate with our Data Scientists, Data Engineers, and Consultants on various client projects in multidisciplinary teams. You will use advanced analytics, machine learning, and GenAI techniques to solve complex business problems and deliver impactful solutions.
   

  





**Responsibilities include:**



* Collaborate with colleagues to identify business challenges and extract actionable insights from data.


* Develop and implement statistical models, optimization solutions, and advanced machine learning techniques.


* Apply Generative AI and large language models to create innovative solutions.


* Clearly present analytical results and assist in facilitating client workshops.



**Your profile**



* Motivated, analytical, and eager to learn.


* Thrive in collaborative, multidisciplinary environments.


* Clear communicator, comfortable translating complex technical concepts into actionable recommendations.


**Qualifications**
* Completed WO Master's degree in Data Science, Econometrics, Applied Mathematics, Computer Science, (Energy) Engineering, or a related technical field involving substantial programming.


* 1 to 3 years of relevant professional experience.


* Strong coding skills in Python and at least one additional analytical language (e.g., R, SQL).
* You have a strong interest in data and AI\-related topics, the ability to quickly build expertise in these areas, and you’re excited about helping our clients seize the opportunities they offer.


* Solid knowledge of Machine Learning techniques, optimization methods, and Generative AI.


* Previous exposure or interest in cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP) is a plus.


* Fluent in English and Dutch, both written and oral. Additional languages are considered advantageous.



**What we offer**



* Training and development opportunities to advance your expertise.


* A supportive environment with structured mentorship and personalized training opportunities.


* Opportunities to participate in international projects.


* Flexible working hours and performance\-based promotion.


* Competitive salary, bonus, and benefits package (lease car, health insurance, pension).


**Additional Information**

 We are unable to provide a work permit for this position.
   

  





 Non\-Dutch speakers will unfortunately not be accepted.
   

  





 Sia is an equal opportunity employer. Employment decisions—including hiring, promotion, remuneration, or disciplinary actions—are based solely on performance, competence, conduct, and business needs.

title: UI/UX Designer (Remote Opportunity)
description:
**Position:** 
 UX/UI Designer
 



**Compensation:** 
 AED 15,000 \- AED 20,000 per month \+ Up to 10% Performance Bonus
 



**📍 Where you'll work: Remote (Anywhere in the world)** 




  





**Role Overview:
 *We're seeking an AI\-first UX/UI Designer who understands how generative AI integrates into e\-commerce design workflows — and brings both the technical fluency and creative judgment to make it drive real business outcomes.***




  





 You'll embed an AI\-first methodology into daily design execution, using advanced generative AI tools to design exceptional user experiences that accelerate creative output and drive customer conversion. You'll research, test, and integrate new AI design tools to keep our creative process at the industry's cutting edge.
 



  





**The Career Accelerator** 




 You'll compress years of AI\-native design mastery into months. You'll ship more high\-impact design experiments in your first year than most UX/UI designers ship in three. You'll design systems that touch every customer touchpoint—product pages, checkout flows, conversational commerce, personalization modules—building execution instincts through sheer volume that takes others years to develop. This pace energizes impatient high\-performers. It exhausts clock\-watchers. If you get frustrated when you're not learning fast enough, you'll thrive here.
 



  





**What Is In It For You:** 




 This isn't just another UX/UI design role. This is your chance to become a true industry architect.
 



  





**1\. Master the Frontier of AI\-Native Design** 




 Most designers dabble with AI tools. You'll become fluent in the entire GenAI design stack—Figma AI, Nano Banana, Vertex AI, Midjourney—and use them in production workflows daily. You'll design interfaces that most designers won't touch for years: semantic search results, conversational shopping assistants, AI\-powered recommendation modules. You'll research and champion emerging tools, keeping our practice at the industry's cutting edge. While others debate whether AI will replace designers, you'll be the designer who multiplies their impact exponentially by mastering AI as a creative partner.
 



  





**2\. Partner with the 1%:** 



* 🏆 Top 5 Mattress Brand in the USA with Over
 **$1 Billion USD** 
 in Sales
* 🌍 Great Place to Work Certified
* 💡 Work with Forbes Council Member CEO
* Gain firsthand exposure to strategic decisions and high\-velocity execution that drives a global brand.



  





**3\. Own Real Impact with Direct Business Accountability** 




 Most UX/UI roles give you design tasks disconnected from outcomes. Here, your work is tied directly to conversion metrics, A/B test results, and revenue impact. You'll see how your detail page redesign lifted conversion, how your checkout flow reduced abandonment. You'll collaborate with Growth and Engineering teams to execute experiments and translate data\-driven insights into tangible design improvements. Your portfolio won't just show pretty screens—it'll show business results.
 



  





**What You'll Need:** 



* 3\-5 years of experience in web design: Preferably from an e\-commerce background
* A strong portfolio showcasing shipped product work: With a clear connection to business metrics (e.g., conversion lift, improved engagement) on detail pages, listing pages, or checkout flows
* Expert Figma proficiency: Including components, variables, and Dev Mode
* Hands\-on experience with modern GenAI design tools: (e.g., Figma AI, Nano Banana, Vertex AI, Midjourney etc.) in a professional workflow, with a portfolio demonstrating your ability to guide them to brand\-aligned outcomes
* A demonstrable passion for the AI space: With a proven ability to quickly learn, evaluate, and integrate new technologies and tools into your design process
* Familiarity with emerging UX patterns for AI: Such as conversational search, assistant UIs, and recommendation modules
* Excellent communication skills: With an ability to articulate design rationale and present research on new tools clearly



  





**Good\-to\-Have:** 



* Experience designing chat or guided\-selling flows
* Comfort collaborating on experiments (A/B testing, multivariate) and understanding their purpose
* Working knowledge of WCAG 2\.2 and foundational SEO principles for e\-commerce



  





**The Puffy DNA** 




 We're restless, perpetually hungry, and fast\-paced, driven by an unwavering belief that we can outperform any competitor — regardless of their size.
 


* **Be the Owner:** 
 We don't hire employees; we welcome owners. You're accountable for results, not activity.
* **Execute with Urgency:** 
 We thrive in high\-stakes environments by making thoughtful decisions quickly and acting decisively.
* **Demand Excellence:** 
 We solve the hard problems that others can't, pushing the boundaries of our craft.
* **Be AI\-First:** 
 Daily multi\-turn AI conversations challenge your assumptions.
* **Go All\-In:** 
 When the mission demands it, we rally as one team to cross the finish line.



  





**✨ Your Total Compensation \& Benefits** 




  





 💰
 **Compensation:** 



* Monthly performance bonuses (up to 10%)



  





 🏥
 **Health \& Protection:** 



* Comprehensive medical, dental, and vision insurance



  





 🌴
 **Time Off:** 



* Generous Paid Time Off (PTO) \+ Public holidays



  





 💼
 **Work Environment:** 



* AI First organization with access to AI\-native tool stack
* Remote First: Work from the comfort of your home office
* Option to work from our Dubai office with full relocation \& visa support
* Learning \& development opportunities
* International team collaboration (14\+ nationalities)



  





 🏆
 **Rewards \& Recognition:** 



* The Leaders Club: Opportunity for selection to an elite lifestyle transforming recognition program featuring premium wellness memberships, exclusive professional networking events, and annual leadership retreats
* 'We Are' Champion: Monthly recognition program with gift vouchers and company\-wide celebration for exceptional contributions



  





 The alternative is another year where your potential is capped and your optimization hypotheses die in committee.
 



  





**Ready to Shape Your Story?** 




 Click "Apply" and take the first step.
